body:
Your personal link for this critical poll is only active for a few more minutes
Fellow American,

Fellow Conservative, Kevin McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - but if we miss our critical fundraising deadline _we are going to fail._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans today to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

I'm only sending this hail mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. This is your _last chance_ to help House Republicans make it to the endzone.

**It 's game over without you.**

It's all up to you. If you ignore our pleas and drop the ball, then our chances of stopping Biden and Schumer's radical agenda are gone.

Can you rush $8 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the left in their tracks?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ann=20&=20Kevin?=
subject: Minor Wins 🔥
body:
| | | Peter,I’m writing to you today to update you on a victory for medical freedom.Just a few days before Christmas, President Joe Biden signed the 2023 National Defense Authorization Act into law. The bill comes around every year and funds the Defense Department. You might have seen something about it but the media is not talking about one of the items in it, which requires the Defense Secretary to rescind the mandate that members of the armed forces be vaccinated against COVID-19.
**Finally, a victory for those of us fighting against medical tyranny!!** Remember back in August of 2021 when the Secretary of Defense ordered the COVID-19 vaccine mandate for all military personnel? Some 98% of active duty service members were vaccinated.That means that COVID-19 vaccines were needlessly forced on nearly all of our 1.3+ million military personnel. Imagine the negative repercussions that the vaccine will have on those brave men and women for decades. That mandate was a direct assault on medical autonomy.**THIS IS A HUGE VICTORY FOR THOSE FIGHTING GOVERNMENT OVERREACH, BUT WE CAN’T STOP HERE!**
---
| [KEEP UP THE FIGHT AGAINST MEDICAL TYRANNY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2641461b5e&e=fdefed58de)
---
The Zelenko Freedom Foundation is an organization devoted to educating the public about how to protect their health and fight for their rights as patients and consumers. For years, we have worked to share valuable information with the world that is often being suppressed by Silicon Valley oligarchs and corrupt corporate interests. In collusion with our own government, these corporate thugs put pure greed ahead of the American public.We have all come to understand that the COVID virus was man made and was treatable from the outset. The COVID “pandemic” was all about the two things the leftists crave the most: MONEY AND POWER.Let’s join together in taking BOTH away from them!**DONATE TO THE ZELENKO FOUNDATION TODAY TO BECOME A FREEDOM FIGHTER!**
| [BECOME A FREEDOM FIGHTER TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=354d05859f&e=fdefed58de)
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=df37ae2fec&e=fdefed58de)
In addition to exposing government and corporate lies about COVID, the Zelenko Foundation aims to invest in the future of America to make sure this doesn’t happen again. We want to train people to gain access to the healthcare industry and technology that will shape our future and preserve our God given rights. We want to incubate a prestigious group of young professionals who will go forth to make a difference and become leaders in their communities and industry... **and will stand firmly in favor of medical freedom!** But we can’t fight tyranny and educate the next generation of freedom fighting healthcare workers without funding. Your support of our mission is what will make us successful. We here at the Foundation are carrying on the vision of our founder, Vladimir “Zev” Zelenko, MD, who was a Nobel Peace Prize Nominee and a board certified physician in the US.
Do you think for one minute that the government would have stopped at just the military? If the government would have had the authority to require every American citizen to take the vaccine, it certainly would have. AND THAT’S THEIR AIM WITH THE NEXT “PLAN-DEMIC” THAT COMES AROUND!
| [DONATE NOW: LET’S BEAT THEM AT THEIR OWN GAME!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e43fabac2c&e=fdefed58de)
---
Together, let’s stand against the government/big pharma machine that want to destroy us and make us guinea pigs to be tested on. Your contribution today will ensure that we can keep fighting and pushing back!! It’s a new year, but we’re in the same fight.Thank you for taking the time to read this email today & thank you in advance for your _**generous**_ contribution.
| [SUPPORT THE Z FREEDOM FOUNDATION TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8b3982a2c7&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you and God Bless you,
Kevin Jenkins & Ann Vandersteel, Co-Chairs
Zelenko Freedom Foundation
|

We here at the Foundation are carrying on the vision of our founder, Vladimir “Zev” Zelenko, MD, who was a Nobel Peace Prize Nominee and a board certified physician in the US. Do you think for one minute that the government would have stopped at just the military? If the government would have had the authority to require every American citizen to take the vaccine, it certainly would have. AND THAT’S THEIR AIM WITH THE NEXT “PLAN-DEMIC” THAT COMES AROUND! | Together, let’s stand against the government/big pharma machine that want to destroy us and make us guinea pigs to be tested on. Your contribution today will ensure that we can keep fighting and pushing back!! It’s a new year, but we’re in the same fight.Thank you for taking the time to read this email today & thank you in advance for your generous contribution. | Thank you and God Bless you, Kevin Jenkins & Ann Vandersteel, Co-Chairs Zelenko Freedom Foundation | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump just attacked me – “Schiff is a sleazebag and traitor,” “should be prosecuted”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, Donald Trump attacked me again yesterday on Truth Social,
to engender even greater hatred of me among his loyal MAGA followers. But
that’s not the whole story:

“Schiff is a sleazebag and traitor, and should be prosecuted for the damage he
has done to our Country!” —Donald Trump, 1/8/23

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Bvk6kQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]Screenshot of Truth Social Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump: Schiff is a
sleazebag and traitor, and should be prosecuted for the damage he has done to
our Country!

Trump has leveled attacks like this against his enemies before. You’ve
seen them. He’s been doing it for years. So what makes this one any
different?

Timing.

As Trump posted this attack, thousands of rioters were storming and
ransacking Brazil’s Congress, Supreme Court, and presidential palace in an
insurrection that mirrored the January 6th attack on the United States
Capitol.

As these events show, Trump’s ongoing attack on his opponents and our
democracy — including calling for his opponents to be prosecuted — is
inciting dangerous imitators around the world.

Police barricades in Brazil were forcibly crossed. Windows and doors were
smashed. Papers, furniture, anything in sight was torn, burned, soiled.
Rioters clad in the green, yellow, and blue of Brazil’s flag gleefully
shared their escapades on Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram.

Sound familiar?

The rioters were supporters of the ousted strongman Jair Bolsonaro, the
“Trump of the Tropics,” who also spread lies about the presidential
election he lost, culminating in a violent early January attack on his
nation’s capital.

Derek, this is why we cannot let Trump’s many attacks on our
democracy go unanswered or accept them as normal. They are not, and they
pose a grave danger to the entire idea of liberal democracy around the
world. Even a twice-impeached, disgraced ex-president’s words carry
weight. If we fail to respond, I fear very much for the future of
democracy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=jan2023_abs_em.c5g5-1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]So Derek, I am urgently asking you to make a contribution to
our campaign and help us respond to Trump’s destructive lies that are
inspiring the global right-wing authoritarian movement. His continuing
attacks on our democracy and its defenders must not go unanswered. I am
counting on your help. Thanks so much.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em.6K9j-B&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2023_abs_em.0DnwtB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Cm-_r3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1008&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em.cg_Pq_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1009&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jan2023_abs_em.tb8BsE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1010&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Bvk6kQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1011&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for pitching in what you can to stand with us.

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1561%2E5257348%2EKGTaV4 ]Privacy Policy

body:

| Friend,

**Joe Biden has completely failed the American people at the southern border.**

Over **5 MILLION** illegal immigrants have attempted to cross into our country since Biden took office—including **ONE MILLION** migrants that evaded law enforcement altogether and entered America undetected.

| After more than **700 DAYS** in the oval office, President Biden **FINALLY** visited the southern border on Sunday...**_for a photo op. _**

[**The truth is: Americans need real action at the border, not another photo op from Joe Biden and his liberal allies in Washington.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f81c3acc17&e=1050d051da)

**House Republicans have a plan to end the Biden Border Crisis once and for all:**
✓ Finish the wall

name: American Update
subject: The Digital Dollar and the End of Privacy…Protect Your Savings Today!
body:
| | The End of Privacy for Americans... Get Out of Cash Now!
---

Have you heard of Executive Order 14067? This little known Order implemented the Digital Dollar, the most sinister plan to control your spending.

And it gets worse, in November the Federal Government and banks began a test program to roll out the Digital Dollar.

With this privacy for all Americans will be lost forever. Imagine:
| • | The government can now track all of your spending!
---|---
• | The government can tell you what you can and can’t buy!

name: Shift WA
subject: FWD: Help fact-check Inslee
body:
Did you see our email below?

Jay Inslee will deliver his 2023 State of the State address TODAY at NOON.

You cannot count on the mainstream media to fact-check his speech which you can count on being riddled with misleading claims and blatant lies. That's why we need your help to fact-check his address!

Simply **_[click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362275:sFX7a2DNb:m:1:2610672541:51FE42D767C3E56061025A93C934F970:r)_** to write in the biggest lie that Inslee tells today, and we'll highlight the responses on our website following his speech.

**_> >> [HELP FACT-CHECK INSLEE](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362275:sFX7a2DNb:m:1:2610672541:51FE42D767C3E56061025A93C934F970:r) <<<_**

Thank you,

The Shift WA team
The mainstream media will do nothing to fact-check Jay Inslee's State of the State address. That's why we need your help to fact-check his usual lies and phony claims of success. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362276:sFX7a2DNb:m:1:2610672541:51FE42D767C3E56061025A93C934F970:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Jay Inslee will deliver his annual State of the State address tomorrow (Tuesday, January 10th) at noon. The 2023 Legislative Session will officially commence on Wednesday.

Our state has seemingly no end of pressing challenges to solve. Communities across the state are suffering from the impacts of skyrocketing crime. Deadly drugs like fentanyl are flooding our neighborhoods at unprecedented rates. Homelessness is growing while government continues to pump billions into failing "solutions."

Yet - despite all these challenges - Inslee is expected to focus his 2023 address to our state on the need to expand on his extreme (and failing) green energy policies. He will also concentrate his comments on "abortion rights." After delivering his extreme remarks, Inslee will - undoubtedly - spend a portion of his speech gaslighting the public by praising his ineffective record.

The mainstream media will do nothing to fact-check Inslee on any of his extreme comments or claims of success. And that's why we need your help.

**[Will you help us fact-check Inslee's State of the State tomorrow at noon?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362277:sFX7a2DNb:m:1:2610672541:51FE42D767C3E56061025A93C934F970:r)**

Simply [**click here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362277:sFX7a2DNb:m:1:2610672541:51FE42D767C3E56061025A93C934F970:r) to write in the biggest lie that Inslee tells tomorrow, and we'll highlight the responses on our website following his speech.
**> >> [HELP FACT-CHECK INSLEE](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362277:sFX7a2DNb:m:1:2610672541:51FE42D767C3E56061025A93C934F970:r) <<<**
Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362278:sFX7a2DNb:m:1:2610672541:51FE42D767C3E56061025A93C934F970:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14108615&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osFX7a2DNb).

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom altern
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z79hmvdfjvjq1ofc4261ghf6fjmidc89sc3o1d3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpim9oj2c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uorm0spkehobct5i6hh7cd70shh33dr4s1j68ctkseqbedb6mup38s75m1o64s37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sjjcoo79ddksupb4phlc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
| *Sponsored Message* | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf3p0e4kvqm078el4tol96bu5fjafq8cdanqmm08_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpim9oj2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlharhergcv7ocijf5i9m2nbftkfu7228knbdha8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpim9oj2c5h2bs)****["](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd3a40lqrp0egt5m9l5moc71gqss9upgir0hlir8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpim9oj2c5h2bs) --is now available as a free online video series.**
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqso6ioim7n6tog7kvr7q68mq7u2g15ci8ofl1eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpim9oj2c5h2bs)
---
| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z37so2jsk3pmar4hve4avirbgl8dsvpi3iu5njq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpim9oj2c5h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
We need your support before the legislature returns tomorrow.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57133225/386975707/823540626?refcode=ea.a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM3Yzk0Mi1mMzkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Quv6XzDuq9dUxoDYOAUU81iyzCMEshfBqHec5dhVyc=&emci=95a5f994-148e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter — _It should be obvious that letting our state lose money when we don’t have to is bad governance._ But that’s exactly what Republicans in our state legislature are allowing to happen by _refusing_ to expand Medicaid for North Carolina. **[Peter, this has got to stop. When the legislature returns to session tomorrow, politicians need to know that we DEMAND Medicaid expansion in 2023. Add your name here to show your support>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57133227/386975711/280058852?refcode=ea.a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM3Yzk0Mi1mMzkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Quv6XzDuq9dUxoDYOAUU81iyzCMEshfBqHec5dhVyc=&emci=95a5f994-148e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** Look, North Carolina loses $521 million every single month we don’t pass expansion. That’s money that could go right back into delivering for our people. **Most importantly, 600,000 more North Carolinians could get covered by Medicaid. They deserve access to affordable and reliable care!** Republican legislative leaders for years have blocked Medicaid expansion. They even sued Governor Cooper for trying to move it forward. Now Republicans say they are for it, but they still haven’t brought it to a vote. **Denying North Carolinians the medical care they deserve is cruel. Wasting our state’s money is irresponsible. Let’s end this mess NOW.** **[Sign Roy’s petition demanding Republicans prioritize Medicaid expansion when the legislature returns tomorrow>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57133229/386975713/280058852?refcode=ea.a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM3Yzk0Mi1mMzkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Quv6XzDuq9dUxoDYOAUU81iyzCMEshfBqHec5dhVyc=&emci=95a5f994-148e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | ****[SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57133231/386975715/280058852?refcode=ea.a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTM3Yzk0Mi1mMzkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Quv6XzDuq9dUxoDYOAUU81iyzCMEshfBqHec5dhVyc=&emci=95a5f994-148e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=a537c942-f390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)****

clean_body: We need your support before the legislature returns tomorrow. | Peter — It should be obvious that letting our state lose money when we don’t have to is bad governance. But that’s exactly what Republicans in our state legislature are allowing to happen by refusing to expand Medicaid for North Carolina. Look, North Carolina loses $521 million every single month we don’t pass expansion. That’s money that could go right back into delivering for our people. Most importantly, 600,000 more North Carolinians could get covered by Medicaid. They deserve access to affordable and reliable care! Republican legislative leaders for years have blocked Medicaid expansion. They even sued Governor Cooper for trying to move it forward. Now Republicans say they are for it, but they still haven’t brought it to a vote. Denying North Carolinians the medical care they deserve is cruel. Wasting our state’s money is irresponsible. Let’s end this mess NOW. | ** Thank you, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. Formally titled the “Family and Small Business Taxpayer Protection Act,” it is the first bill passed by the GOP-controlled house. The funding boost, which was signed into law last [...] READ MORE ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6idcld39346u3m0m7tjc8p8n8bp7nta6lf5dleo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cphm4o34c9h2bs)

Idaho effectively upheld its statewide ban on abortion. Idaho had enacted trigger laws defending the unborn in 2021 and 2022. The laws contain abortion bans that were set to take effect when [...] READ MORE ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrlie6rev1mf8spgs6ue90907gl4nju7u2jrors0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cphm4o34c9h2bs)

Hey,

I wanted you to be the first to know:

**I have officially filed the petition to transfer my election case from Maricopa County to the State Supreme Court.
**
**[Rush a donation so we can keep pushing this case! They want us to stop but we must prove them WRONG.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f6fc445efd7a4a9683a3fc60e64066ca&_e=eYTcpnfh61xORzND4XQsJdFGy2uZld5ogSrNfCreR-1xH32LBwo43yHul5OVPD0Y_yScEDIw4Km0BKa3QyHehvVLn7pDRrf0-LapKq8U6_sQi6G8Mpp_76ipvzL_mz5MnZctYPuV3s8_EwIYpugwsWUjsVcMC-uMvN1noQSjVAU_G1PZGgDPkR6bC9Ntf7x5tUOes44w_iLeMbzTI9iUeCB4LTEBlomQno-C-ds3tjObTT1rJMP_RL3dABP24nA85C-T-AOHWL3b1ErxXLCDmfxHmj8lQujrPWFS0ThN2H96LW4m60ObFcE4U_EOGE_o5BLR6xeSZmVb_-hLQnAtYPPEa_rV_B-43Yvcq-zpHLovm6XICwstA0bP6HfHZ0BZsAuoGbWo0JRb6VnVu7lmA5xTUX_YLAPrPAbbD9HghM7IZGmOR4Rp3_AD_y_5UvyxQQA5UeUgA5b0CKbxe-tpBxemjDttFYZBFrY0wO2PAUCLyUYVh5RbjBNQnWXD0LQVu0IJiXK2ecBp6sdlULWwxsbchDPqBgR-tqE1n1j39s8%3D)

I believe in free and fair, honest, and transparent elections. And I will not stop fighting until we get those in Arizona. This is about making sure the voice of Arizona is heard

subject: THIS MORNING: How to watch Gov. Polis’s historic inauguration ceremony

body:
Today is the big day!

Friend — today is the big day! Governor Polis and Lt. Gov. Primavera will be officially sworn in for their second term serving the people of Colorado. **Swearing-In Ceremony**
Today, January 10, 2023
Program begins at 10:30 a.m. MT
Colorado State Capitol, Denver
_[Link for Livestream](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57139895/387001770/-803653937?v=yK_fK7ooaZo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njc5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGEwNDM0Ny0wMDkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7WjYp9bV_ItNX97NA1x2PG2Cs_wyMyq6d4aURrHfXhU=&emci=1e1612ba-fe90-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=68a04347-0091-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25481868)_ At the Ceremony, Gov. body:
One week after swearing in...

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57141701/387008514/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjkyYmUxZS0wNjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TvHWq3UnyMfNu7nLUW04wrDlN_RMKrmcbGkRN04r_c=&emci=071623e1-fd90-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=7692be1e-0691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | It’s been one week since the new Senate was sworn in, Derek. 2022 was an incredible year with plenty of accomplishments to celebrate – but there are still big issues for us to tackle in 2023 and I’m looking forward to working with my Senate colleagues to find bipartisan solutions for our country. Whether it’s expanding and protecting access to reproductive health care, holding big tech accountable to make the internet a safer place, ensuring every American’s right to vote is protected, or taking action on climate change, I’m ready to face these challenges head on. _[**Will you pitch in $5 right now to join me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57141702/387008515/-879665159?refcode=mw_em_230110_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjkyYmUxZS0wNjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TvHWq3UnyMfNu7nLUW04wrDlN_RMKrmcbGkRN04r_c=)_ My work to defend Virginia’s values is never over. Let’s start the new year off strong. _[**Please, Derek, chip in whatever you can afford so we can make progress for Virginia and for our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57141703/387008516/-879665159?refcode=mw_em_230110_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjkyYmUxZS0wNjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TvHWq3UnyMfNu7nLUW04wrDlN_RMKrmcbGkRN04r_c=)_ Thank you, Mark **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57141704/387008517/-879665159?refcode=mw_em_230110_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjkyYmUxZS0wNjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TvHWq3UnyMfNu7nLUW04wrDlN_RMKrmcbGkRN04r_c=)**

Friend, 2023 must be the year to get election integrity work done in Congress. As Co-Chair of the Election Integrity Caucus, it will be **my number issue #1 this year,** but it also needs to be the _main focus_ for the rest of Congress. We need _free_ , _fair_ , _accurate_ , and _transparent_ elections to maintain the foundation of our Constitutional Republic. **NO ONE** is fighting harder than me every day to protect our elections. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll energize my fight in the New Year by [**making a first donation of 2023 >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=657daa5168&e=fdefed58de)

name: VADEMS
subject: Session starts tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
abortion rights are at stake

|
---
Derek, The 2023 General Assembly session starts tomorrow and we wanted to remind you what’s at stake as legislators convene in Richmond. **For the GOP, the name of the game is abortion rights.** Republicans, Delegate Marie March and Senator Travis Hackworth, have already submitted legislation that **would establish a “life begins at conception” law and create a total ban on abortion in Virginia.** **It’s likely to pass the House and Gov. Youngkin has said that he’d sign any anti-abortion legislation with a smile.** The _only_ protection the people of Virginia have is the Senate of Virginia, where Democrats hold a slim majority. There is a special election today in SD-07 that could tip the balance of power in the Senate and ensure the right to an abortion in Virginia. **[But for that to happen, Democrats need to flip the Republican-held district in Norfolk and Virginia Beach.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57143571/387016180/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230110-session&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzZlZDhmZS0wYTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_XMgwYWwlkLMbAQu9dUC83zL5xXvjfbjHTro3sPcBhI=)** **It’s Election Day in Virginia.[Can we count on you to chip in before the polls close tonight and session begins tomorrow?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57143573/387016181/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230110-session&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzZlZDhmZS0wYTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_XMgwYWwlkLMbAQu9dUC83zL5xXvjfbjHTro3sPcBhI=)** We have the opportunity to protect abortion rights in Virginia — _this is one of the most important fights we’re in right now, and we can’t afford to lose._ I hope you’ll join us. clean_body: abortion rights are at stake | Derek, The 2023 General Assembly session starts tomorrow and we wanted to remind you what’s at stake as legislators convene in Richmond. For the GOP, the name of the game is abortion rights. Republicans, Delegate Marie March and Senator Travis Hackworth, have already submitted legislation that would establish a “life begins at conception” law and create a total ban on abortion in Virginia. It’s likely to pass the House and Gov. Youngkin has said that he’d sign any anti-abortion legislation with a smile. The only protection the people of Virginia have is the Senate of Virginia, where Democrats hold a slim majority. There is a special election today in SD-07 that could tip the balance of power in the Senate and ensure the right to an abortion in Virginia. = It’s Election Day in Virginia.= We have the opportunity to protect abortion rights in Virginia — this is one of the most important fights we’re in right now, and we can’t afford to lose. I hope you’ll join us. name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmqr1eqjkhgnei9ssleij7ifb450309uf8jf0bv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76clh2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi92u8vidiegotgq3d1vb28udqgus7j7032s8fn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76clh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z89696aigrr0jludh2hv7p33daha2j14v156k5oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76clh2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsg0qhioqj3c9vmnm5n1662ncuv8a9lckl8bor5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76clh2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z576epcuvqb794cvhi72ofj84dfshm3n2u2358so_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76clh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ekurbi9070qh1mbmtk5n9tb6eerk6k4qcpa6s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76clh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zong3s1t3esqfuqdprsa96bo2u3v1rs7r4va107o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76clh2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpcjpmrui8mdd23co0r2ovbuc7drpucspt2rjh38_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76clh2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrgqikprck7l3o4m87onj910per8pa3get28apq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76clh2bs).

On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see . ## 1 Week Away!
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers, while 82% of Americans believe that _"God helps those who help themselves"_ is a Bible verse. In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16743704.9719.1.5ad9f6b4e1f3852d428df2fa9a78fb81). I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16743704.9720.1.c7876b17db13e14f7bef023a47d58eda) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple. [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16743704.9721.1.dc0be2518c990edd45636084d8947bec) is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online (you can LITERALLY watch anytime from anywhere). _"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15** Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16743704.9722.1.165aeab0acac047a730904ed92c2c0ce) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester. **Spring Semester Courses** :
\- Christian Theology
\- Pauline Epistles
\- Apologetics
\- Church History 2
\- Leadership & Ethics
\- Evangelism & Outreach Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16743704.9723.1.1f714aea35fe9a0fcdef26a2e1526ba3)
Thank you,

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zanoh61cq64ddje89drucptabs13hvti3gdeongg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76cth2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmq8ep4up9ch8qv48sf26smmaaev6lvl1qp8gnfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76cth2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvksdse2c8aup6119gtkp7etekd3dh0u2h4h6p1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76cth2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfd0svfdlj0kggmhvgp1qfbpmo4i8chl626ftmfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm0p76cth2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqhipj2bfisjlau0lur87l03ppnu47h92mdkj0io_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm8o70cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zelu81tnm1qlhtlaoaqi7ldkrk0hj4ilrent3mog_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm8o70cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp904bi3r85nkiqeec62ciig4b7glculeo5jr9e8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm8o70cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

body:
Dear Peter, finally, the embarrassing mess that was the Republican speaker debacle has come to an end. This GOP trainwreck was the longest speaker fight in more than a hundred years. | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, Finally, the embarrassing mess that was the Republican speaker debacle has come to an end. This GOP trainwreck was the longest speaker fight in more than a hundred years. While Republicans demonstrated their utter incompetence and lack of unity, Democrats never wavered in their support of Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries.

As Pennsylvanians, we’re proud to have won every contested House seat in 2022. Thanks to supporters like you, we know we did everything we could to keep Democratic margins in Congress strong. But our work doesn’t end there. We have the historic chance to make Representative Jefferies the first person of color speaker of the house in this next cycle, while sending these radical, dysfunctional Republicans back to the minority. We can’t do this without your help. Starting right now, we can begin the work of sending these extreme Republicans back to the minority and make sure Representative Jefferies becomes our next Speaker of the House. **[Will you chip in to help ensure that Democrats have the resources we need to win big in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57145041/387021527/1978883179?refcode=11023email&recurring=1&&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRmNTU5OS0xMDkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kR4rzZ8O1dUBPiV-GQjTqin9-XB5TruIvv-vsqc3qp4=)**

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjuuhsesffe2pvjjftb30fj9399mieammoe19dqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmcor0c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbqmbg9bm1c25scot5m7337n7s8bqt0f4ct8q5cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmcor0c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc7pmaki6ei34huhlgta336sqpm9tu65hu5k86io_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmcor0c3h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:
| | The End of Privacy for Americans... Get Out of Cash Now!
---

Have you heard of Executive Order 14067? This little known Order implemented the Digital Dollar, the most sinister plan to control your spending.

And it gets worse, in November the Federal Government and banks began a test program to roll out the Digital Dollar.

With this privacy for all Americans will be lost forever. Imagine:
| • | The government can now track all of your spending!
---|---
• | The government can tell you what you can and can't buy!
• | The government could confiscate your cash!

When digital currency was rolled out in China, Bloomberg wrote, "**this will lead to control like no other**."

The EU has announced that they are next, but it is already happening in **America**!

Which makes this [**Wealth Protection Guide**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8094ad5fb054f928b80897112e7f3df&_e=GKLO__rliLVGol9JspMtE0aJ3L2gTya8MHFaWYZXhwWhM__OBS5mrsEcR8yKhaY_C633ycn3o2I2wXxBme7VMsSeZSmQ8s7KK42DZDepw5vYLQ9AdX1PJFwM7lFLWElqgL30qoL2Ws2s13P8muWzKuhZATkXqCZ8_8HfKLh5qctaBPSw2ZpOfqSozzg2aOG7feBb_igozDA9uXaobaeKK9xU0qYXjV71UWZT7ARlVjW0j0ScSXVwT9dPGOWCH7a-g62dRQ8NeLJjZAG5tEjg3hPHucdWgLYBBDwhtDMp-PpormPsdsnQTr3JPYhrqIedHX7JUzMU1jyshVSG3De2dQo-FI2DXhAX509fXNGbCulhhgH6bw8WY6vrNDUTdRvZ2Pd-YU7kVUi985ybSUY13w1QiuDCkhDfbKBKVUrRNVg0F5sV7M6xVYiVSyoySKLt) that American Alternative Assets just put out even more urgent.

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7539%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=tByw5%2fFat1yNmVYoxvmY5A&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78666%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SAjUF6GEF4YzmC4ugb53dw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78667%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xqegoKYA9Z1JBW7fEwkc0Q&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78668%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rd84gLRdmNVYhGOlkwNL%2fQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: it will be worth it. it will be worth it. | Hey, I wanted you to be the first to know: I have officially filed the petition to transfer my election case from Maricopa County to the State Supreme Court. The complete and utter CHAOS that was the Arizona governor election needs to be EXAMINED BY THE SUPREME COURT! I will not concede. Why? Because Katie Hobbs was not duly elected. I believe in free and fair, honest, and transparent elections. And I will not stop fighting until we get those in Arizona. This is about making sure the voice of Arizona is heard I know this is an uphill battle, but I promise you it will be worth it. God bless, Kari Lake | Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0n9ouatpn1rdnenpakdspvohm17d4f5b31ilmlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmaob4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zop53mk826la1jb385qrtqto15gd1mrm30n0h5e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmaob4cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zotaecva47anc8uj172ss0n47i38tvsiinpocesg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmaob4cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

subject: well, that escalated quickly...
body:
|
---
| | If you didn't watch the Caldwell School Board meeting last night... _you need to._

Because they abruptly **ENDED** their meeting in the midst of being called out by Senator Chris Trakel.

They just... cut his mic off mid-sentence and called it a night.

Why?

Because Idahoans are sick of leftist school boards pushing transgender ideology on our KIDS.

I'm proud to be a co-laborer with Senator Trakel in the new Idaho Senate...

And we're JUST getting started.

[Click here to see the fireworks](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=01759a8376&e=dea908e0fe "See what happenned!")

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s. **

Want to know what we (members of the newly formed Idaho State Freedom Caucus) think of Governor Little's "State of the State" address yesterday?

[Click here to see our press release](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=16ba04f295&e=dea908e0fe)

**p.p.s. **

Don't forget, we're hosting a "School Choice Townhall" THIS Thursday night from 6:30 - 8pm.

It's at the Idaho State Capitol, in the Lincoln Auditorium.

Get there early to grab a seat!

([More details here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=c59256d178&e=dea908e0fe "School Choice Townhall Details"))

name: Derek Kilmer for Congress
subject: Let Derek know what issues are at the top of your mind moving into 2023:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
It's crucial that Derek hears directly from you, Peter.
Peter, have you had a chance to take our priorities survey yet?

It's important Derek hears directly from you so that he can best represent you - and your interests - in 2023.

**[Will you fill out our short priorities survey to share with Derek what issues matter to you most? Subject: New year, new survey >>

Team -

Thanks to the support of grassroots teams like this one, Derek won reelection and will head back to Congress to represent WA-06 for another term!

**But now, it 's important that Derek hears from you directly about the issues on the top of your mind as we kick off 2023. We will share the responses collected from our survey with Derek** - it's crucial we hear from you to learn more about your concerns.

There's a lot Derek wants to tackle in the new year, including getting big money out of politics, taking a meaningful step forward in the fight against climate change, and creating more economic opportunities for people.

Katie Hobbs thought she was such a great cheater that there was no chance she’d ever get caught.

She was wrong. In a short, two-day trial, my team uncovered a treasure trove of evidence proving that the November election was blatantly influenced and disenfranchised Republican voters to help Katie Hobbs win.

Every day that we keep fighting the morally corrupt and unAmerican shadow cabal pulling the strings in Arizona are shaking in their boots.

**[Time is on our side, but only if we continue getting the support we need.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655298%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=di34BGU9bP8IsxI5vkEzuQ&sysid=1)**

subject: It’s official... Katie Porter is running for Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
It’s our job to support women who dare to run for office and make a difference. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57147496/387030451/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNmMTc0YzUtMWE5MS1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jGhTHGQZpHYEM7l_Ayces_FRy3sgXOlfSHypCqIc96w=)
---
It’s official, Peter: **Katie Porter is running for the U.S. Senate!** When we support women and first time candidates, it gives them the boost they need to aim higher and go further. [_**Can you pitch in right now to help us support more women around the country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57147497/387030452/-1914796982?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNmMTc0YzUtMWE5MS1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jGhTHGQZpHYEM7l_Ayces_FRy3sgXOlfSHypCqIc96w=) HER Time works tirelessly to identify and elevate women bold enough to stand up and run for office in order to make a difference in their communities. These women need even more support than your average candidate, because they’re often seen as longshots, unsuited for public office. But women belong in every room where decisions are being made, whether that’s a school board or the United States Senate. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z98ji43kmsbcv9u1vlcdvarct7a66tqeueipsemg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmeoj4c5h2bs)
|
---

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn1661og0a1it1c1t5pqmnh89lffn4obnc6uuq70_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmeoj4c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkmti4ap0cdk2kt2k2iobbkkstd9ii6i6ncp47uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmeoj4c5h2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrevsfqjl9his9r28p8jmuekrd3j7682pei09bgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmeoj4c5h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgm54mpf151u601o1pj3r4l8lc0aul8d4t72vjn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmeoj4c5h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zevgdua00ketodva56kkughauranp2naas9t2128_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjmeoj4c5h2bs)

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4gnhmu0gpcko111g7mo48tge4lbp6fea7qj00eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm9o32cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1oh6bk79db8ce4h91mjuhe74omgpql532343l08_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm9o32cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4cpao54g91dhj07nbjui590kkjtndb0j2t00930_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm9o32cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Peter,

**Fentanyl.
Heroin.
Meth.**

These and other lethal drugs are pouring across our wide-open border, stealing hundreds of thousands of American lives. Our Country is being POISONED.

The drug cartels are waging war on America--and it is time for America to wage war on the cartels. In this war, Joe Biden has sided AGAINST the United States and WITH the cartels. Biden's Open Borders policies are a deadly betrayal of our Nation.

I have a plan to TAKE DOWN the cartels once I am the 47th President of the United States, but I'll never achieve it without YOUR help. I need YOU to STOP whatever you're doing and follow the link below to watch my NEW video and then make a critical donation.

_When I am in the White House, the drug kingpins and vicious traffickers will never sleep soundly again._
