---|---|---
Florida's Governor reshaped education in the state during his first term, leading the way nationally through pandemic insanity in schools while also securing the rights of parents in their children's education. Recently, an event dubbed the "Freedom Blueprint" hosted almost 200 people [for a training](https://substack.com/redirect/25462e1d-f586-4acd-a2f5-0658684f100e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) featuring DeSantis along with current and former education officials, including former U.S. Secretary of Education Betsy Devos. Indian River County school board member Jacqueline Rosario who won her re-election bid and was endorsed by 1776 Project PAC [told Fox News](https://substack.com/redirect/5297e515-9ed9-4165-96c6-00f1544a581a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "topics such as parents' rights, school choice, roles and responsibilities of school board members versus superintendents were discussed among many others. I fully support his agenda and blueprint for education: it's work I had been advocating for years." Our continued work and attention in the state is reaping major benefits; in 2022 1776 Project PAC won 35 school board races in Florida.
[Donate to 1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/1f6c9d0c-0024-4b73-9b9a-273752838501?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**' Equity' v. Education**
Attorney General Jason Miyares is[ launching an investigation](https://substack.com/redirect/521f91d8-adf1-4f44-986e-18b485ef7a5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to protect the civil rights of students and parents at Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology after a strong request by Governor Glenn Youngkin. The news comes a week after a group of Fairfax County parents announced they are demanding action after they said Thomas Jefferson administrators delayed informing students that they had qualified for a national award ahead of looming college application deadlines. Fairfax County Public Schools has denied deliberately withholding the information from 261 students who were named "commended students" by the National Merit Scholarship Corporation. However there is a significant possibility students lost out on prospective scholarships and other accolades due to the omittance. Lt. Governor Winsome Sears [shared her discontent](https://substack.com/redirect/fdf85291-30a1-4382-a722-4fa5f0088ca1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with the situation; "New year, same Hell. What in the world is going on? And that's what this investigation that the Governor has called for is going to determine," Fairfax County Schools is out-of-hand; and unfortunately it is nothing new.
[Follow 1776 Project PAC on Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/77e262bd-3b37-4577-9e52-b78ea9101625?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**New Groomer Index **
The CDC's Division of Adolescent and School Health is pushing teachers to [conduct self-assessments](https://substack.com/redirect/cfa3609a-c928-4a36-8595-0c4bd91fe0f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to measure how committed they are to "LGBTQ inclusivity" in their instruction. The so-called "self-assessment tool" urges teachers, administrators, school health staff, and others to become an "awesome ally" by [advocating for LGBT curriculum](https://substack.com/redirect/86072b20-f4b1-4a40-88da-e15bc663bfbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and transgender identity in school. Shocking that the same agency that worked hand-in-glove with the unions to keep schools closed is now peddling such controversial and harmful guidance.
[Share 1776's Newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/8431738e-afff-4efa-9b2c-1759bc8c76e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Going into 2023, 1776 Project PAC is energized and fully committed to supporting our candidates and advocating for common sense protections in education. Not only will we continue our record of success, we'll build on it. Now, it's more important than ever that we all rally behind candidates who will champion policies that benefit our students, teachers, and schools. Our fight is far from over.
[Subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUxNzc2cHJvamVjdHBhYy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjk0NzE2NDIxLCJzIjo4ODc1MTEsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE2NzMzNjE4MDYsImV4cCI6MTY3NTk1MzgwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.t9Gfv3Zxv0-H0kiwWizZH337OV3Wdixoe4M79DtcYYQ?)

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for defending his son?
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best, tax-deductible gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ffmcsh4girgjj5nok7ie2ts2m576c27qdjc398_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm9or4clh2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case. Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this.**Mark’s trial is set to begin on January 24th** , so we’re running out of time. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in** – ** by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztkqg4sj9s9ovgh29mmr8aqe1d49iv41qhefmtrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm9or4clh2bs)Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out.Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z03jmfi5g65i0f6h3vpvdroorflbi2hb8l521olo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm9or4clh2bs) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in sending your tax-deductible donations to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrh6jheq97jt0m94rordei7fokfg3eqf21r3aklg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpjm9or4clh2bs) I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don’t hesitate!I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,

Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel

clean_body: I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal | | | | Dear Friend,I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming. Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways.Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case. Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family. We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this.Mark’s trial is set to begin on January 24th , so we’re running out of time. no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out.Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don’t hesitate!I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. | | May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Peter, 2023 must be the year to get election integrity work done in Congress. As Co-Chair of the Election Integrity Caucus, it will be **my number issue #1 this year,** but it also needs to be the _main focus_ for the rest of Congress. We need _free_ , _fair_ , _accurate_ , and _transparent_ elections to maintain the foundation of our Constitutional Republic. **NO ONE** is fighting harder than me every day to protect our elections. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll energize my fight in the New Year by [**making a first donation of 2023 >>** ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4a088226cc9148c282252a94cbbf3cfd&_e=Tw6iJMUdS7OZxOUOIDXM3HZ7G8iw2jP53G0466rZPUf-U0qat-1S8UD9k6oc5u_2tUYLCQdv2fiSUIxjxqnJBMxznMy_e9nEqpyrcVI8QCjZzXHd0aU-7w2r1q5PJC9jdd-HBIZqyMmdtwvaAHapSbx3QoNfvlDoJ99cZ4cOMZxmg1LaksgTl1CyxU6xpkJusbV2w1PnQqS-h1LvLwXni-BUi46F-WNQWoZkq8xR-EOk0bIB8Mb8Kig8xbWIbNERWtt4LsiC2sPTkqDMUXPHEinAzc7zx7NvcoZfmK7A69upvKNFc2XCiliizzdF7rlKCRsT4x6IJDzmIpMZysS__Vl3m-owhRmxp8qjq-27xpFv9DKABSi-b3Kwp-8nn9VSzP1m9EFkCk62_B_04lAodi4Jfnh96FOyNwDTArmRWUYgC0ozTYvTQIae_Ym6KdBh)

**[_Team, I was officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising week – 1,000 gifts in my first seven days – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans, win back the House Majority for Democrats, and defend our democracy. Will you split a gift between myself and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation >>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57135462/386984826/881354314?amount=30&refcode=20230109.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkYjljMTcxLWY3OTAtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BXMTm6L3DPJzM2Qs0mI0M_bOwQhgXyPzujXqHh5gU-8=)

Team, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support:**

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work.**

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first week as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to fight for our democracy. [**_Can I count on you to split a gift between myself and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57135464/386984828/881354314?amount=30&refcode=20230109.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkYjljMTcxLWY3OTAtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BXMTm6L3DPJzM2Qs0mI0M_bOwQhgXyPzujXqHh5gU-8=)

Team, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped secure meaningful gun safety reform for the first time in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House and defend our democracy – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

[**_So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during my first week as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority and defend democracy >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57135475/386984839/881354314?amount=30&refcode=20230109.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkYjljMTcxLWY3OTAtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BXMTm6L3DPJzM2Qs0mI0M_bOwQhgXyPzujXqHh5gU-8=)

Keep the faith,
Hakeem

clean_body: humbly asking, team | | = = Team, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support: I was raised by working-class parents. I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn. Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work. Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first week as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to fight for our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Team, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans. I served as a Trump impeachment manager – even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it. I helped secure meaningful gun safety reform for the first time in 30 years – even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers. I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back. I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics. And I know we can win back the House and defend our democracy – the right way – but I need your help to act fast. Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are. = Keep the faith, Hakeem Leader Jeffries and National Democratic Redistricting Committee are only asking for donations of up to $2,900 per election from individuals and for donations of up to $5,000 per election from federal political committees. Leader Jeffries and National Democratic Redistricting Committee are not asking for donations in excess of these amounts or for donations from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks. = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20P.=20Bradley?=
subject: Dianne Feinstein needs to retire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bradley for Senate
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a4126bb026&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter, this is**James Bradley** and I’m asking for your support to help **Dianne Feinstein** ...**RETIRE**.If you don’t already know me, I made my debut in California politics in 2018 taking on Senator Feinstein in a crowded field of 32 candidates. I was an outsider running a shoestring but effective campaign, but I defied expectations and finished as the top GOP candidate in the race.My friends, I will be your fighter and I won’t hesitate to deliver on the promises I make to my constituents. As a **US Coast Guard** veteran, I took on **Trump** troll **Ted Lieu** and made it once more into the General election before being edged out by the powerful and extravagantly financed Democratic machine.From my days in **The Guard** , I learned that a narrow defeat may be just a necessary step to victory. I didn’t stop with my promise and commitment to serve California and the US, **AND I NEVER WILL!**
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0a076388f5&e=fdefed58de)
| [HELP JAMES BRADLEY RETIRE DIANNE FEINSTEIN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c0ca7aa428&e=fdefed58de)
---
At the fall of Kabul, I put together a team to save the remaining citizens left behind by Biden.I fought for the families of loved ones that died at the hands of Fauci’s Remdesivir Death Protocol.I organized 13 Candidate plaintiffs to clean up the elections after the 2020 steal.**Not bad for a man without a political machine in his corner, carrying on the fight with wit, devotion and a small group of like-minded citizens, huh?**
| [DONATE NOW: HELP JAMES BRADLEY WIN THIS RACE](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b684e93a3f&e=fdefed58de)
---
And now I am ready and eager to take on **Feinstein** once again in the 2024 race, and I want you to be a part of this historic event. I’m therefore asking each of you to step up and contribute now so I can get ahead of the rush. Always an outsider, owned by no faction, I need your help to help California come back from the mess the Loony Left has made for over 40 years!What is it worth to get our state back, to be _**The Golden State**_ once more, and not the butt of jokes about public defecation, failing electrical grids and a collapsing educational system?**Ask yourself now what that’s worth, and then CHIP IN to join this fight with me.**
| [CHIP IN $20 TO RETIRE DIANNE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ede3db5427&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 TO RETIRE DIANNE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=83730bcd7d&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 TO RETIRE DIANNE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=cb87abd3e6&e=fdefed58de)
---
We want term limits in government. Dianne Feinstein, at EIGHTY NINE years old, is the _**perfect**_ example of why we need term limits.At the end of her term, she’ll be 97 years old. Now, I have respect for the elderly but when you’re a century old you’re not fit to serve in Congress anymore.Dianne Feinstein and her Chinese spy driver need to GET GONE from the Senate. I can get rid of her in 2024, but I need to start FAST and I need to start **NOW**!California is a big state but it’s not a state we can’t win with the right effort. We’ve seen the Recall Gavin effort and many other conservative movements take root here. Now that we’re getting a hold on ballot harvesting, we can truly beat the Left.So, chip in to my campaign today so that Dianne won’t understand what hit her when she sees my financial disclosure report and sees the kind of cash we’ll have to spend to take her down!
| [CHIP IN TO RETIRE DIANNE FEINSTEIN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=860684b92b&e=fdefed58de)
---
Victory is ours.Let’s do this,James P. BradleyCandidate for US Senate, 2024
|

name: American Briefing
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zash682t3ka5fjs4tvqmgspn3kerv1u3jtmfvk3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge0o72cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z82h1agsdbc6chsckd9ugfrj5lab4j6umfgvolfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge0o72cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq5a9950ll5ird12ncbe4137fkoub52kf8k8eo1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge0o72cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zgu7a96fm8jbgb5vvlsdf2fgjsr1rcsep41l42mo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo0tglgh8jsh4982t01bgtuf3tmop19dkvecd0og_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cpj61o30s9j649fg)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I am writing to humbly ask if you can contribute $3 to VoteVets today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Throughout the 2022 election, there was no greater partner in the fight to elect House and Senate Democrats than VoteVets.
#
Derek -
Throughout the 2022 election, there was no greater partner in the fight to elect House and Senate Democrats than VoteVets.
VoteVets was always there — running some of the most effective and hard-hitting ads of the entire cycle. Ads that helped elect a number of Democrats who may have otherwise lost.
They’ve been there for us on important legislative fights, as well — most recently on our work to pass the PACT Act and get veterans the care they’ve earned through their service.
The bad news is: VoteVets spent down their resources considerably during the last election, and there are a number of critical fights ahead; fights to regain the House, hold the Senate and make sure we stop Trump from becoming president.
The good news is: you can help. And that is why I am humbly asking:
[**Can you please make your first online $3 contribution to VoteVets today? This is one of the most important organizations out there defending Democrats and our Democracy and they need your help.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230110-1-15&t=1&akid=7260%2E3013755%2Ek-12l-)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.bl6-DZ&refcode=em230110-1-15&t=20&akid=7260%2E3013755%2Ek-12l-)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.Xk4KIQ&refcode=em230110-1-15&t=21&akid=7260%2E3013755%2Ek-12l-)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.SFvRve&refcode=em230110-1-15&t=22&akid=7260%2E3013755%2Ek-12l-)**
---
****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.Qt7iV0&refcode=em230110-1-15&t=23&akid=7260%2E3013755%2Ek-12l-)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $250 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2930?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.lZSit-&refcode=em230110-1-15&t=24&akid=7260%2E3013755%2Ek-12l-)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.Pk7gBV&refcode=em230110-1-15&t=25&akid=7260%2E3013755%2Ek-12l-)**
---
****
Throughout our history, generations of brave Americans have proudly donned the uniform to defend the liberties we all hold dear — fighting valiantly for Democracy in our nation and throughout the world. VoteVets carries that tradition.
I hope you’ll join me in helping them by making a contribution today.
Thank you,
Nancy Pelosi
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230110-1-15&t=26&akid=7260%2E3013755%2Ek-12l-)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=7260%2E3013755%2Ek-12l-).

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sen. Hawley is one of the most dangerous members of Congress. We’re excited that we have a great chance to replace him in 2024, and you can help his opponent, former Marine, Lucas Kunce, start building a campaign that can defeat Hawley.
body:
Replace this insurrectionist in 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbba3a70c-6f27-4da8-af81-dd0b158d1bca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Senator Josh Hawley (R-MO) is one of the most dangerous members of Congress. We’re so glad we now have a great chance to remove him from that position in 2024._** [**_Can you join us in helping fund Marine veteran, Lucas Kunce, in his brave mission to electorally remove the treasonous Hawley from our Senate, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31c502d0-ffc7-4913-b055-1292eeaab2d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **You may recall that, conspiring with Donald Trump** (they spoke on the phone six times the day before the Capitol attack), **_Hawley was the first GOP Congress member to announce he'd reject electoral votes _****_prior to January 6th_**. **_He arrived at the Capitol that day with his fist raised in the air to incite the right-wing mob gathered. Subsequently, the building was attacked for the first time since 1812._** _Of course, once the attack came, Hawley ran away. It was Capitol officers who were left to fight off the attackers, with over 140 stomped, speared, stabbed, clubbed, crushed and otherwise beaten. A few officers ultimately gave their lives for Hawley's sick, self-serving and treasonous behavior. _ **_This was a low-point in our country's history, and no elected official is more responsible for it than Hawley, other than Trump himself._** _**This despicable, democracy arsonist must be defeated in 2024.**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c78b190-1e90-4c13-8d1f-b386715f5548/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Luckily, we have an outstanding Democratic candidate in charismatic veteran Lucas Kunce, a man not scared to call it like it is: That Hawley is a "fraud and a coward" who runs away at the first sign of trouble and belongs nowhere near our Senate. _ [**_Can you join us in helping fund Kunce's brave mission to electorally remove the treasonous Hawley from our Senate, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6bc29b8-2159-4b25-a680-abb3e1727a11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you so much for standing up to seditionists. Cliff

| | |

|
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/lucaskuncevsjoshhawley2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T771b7ea6-0b12-4200-b6f1-8e7b83ab368d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m running… for the Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4)
Derek, I want you to hear it from me first: I’m running for the U.S. Senate.
More on the “why” and the “how” below, but first I want to ask if you’ll be a Founding Donor to our campaign.**Reporting a strong early fundraising number will show the strength of our movement, and I want you on our team.**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14371?refcode=EMAF10_1_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=2&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4)**
**_Why I’m running_**
I don’t look, live, or talk like most Members of Congress. Instead of attending swanky fundraisers with corporate lobbyists, I’m one of a dozen Members of Congress who rejects all contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. **I’m leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading and was the *only* Democrat to oppose earmarks** (which are a way of funding Members’ pet projects). I’m a single mom of three school-aged kids who drives a minivan and uses a whiteboard to break down the math behind corruption and greed. **I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the House—taking on special interests and delivering for working people,** and I’m running for the Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington.
**_How this is going to work_**
This isn’t going to be an easy race, but I wouldn’t be asking for your support if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win. But the reality is, reaching voters in our large and populous state requires serious resources. Because California has a unique system where the top two vote getters in the primary (regardless of party) advance to the general, there are so many unknowns in this race. Building a robust campaign that reaches Californians from all walks of life will be key to our long-term success.
**_My pitch: Become a Founding Donor_**
Winning this race will only be possible because of grassroots supporters. This isn’t BS—**contributions of $10 or $20 are the only reason I was able to win three competitive House races and compete with nearly ten million dollars in Republican super PAC spending this past year** —that’s remarkable, and I’m so grateful. But now we need to reach even more voters and run an even larger campaign, and we’ll be up against even more spending from our opponents. **[Contributing right now will help us kickstart this campaign.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14371?refcode=EMAF10_1_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=3&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14372?refcode=EMAF10_1_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=4&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4) [Donate $22 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14373?refcode=EMAF10_1_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=5&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14374?refcode=EMAF10_1_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=6&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14375?refcode=EMAF10_1_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14376?refcode=EMAF10_1_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=8&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14371?refcode=EMAF10_1_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=9&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4)
---
Derek, thank you for considering making a contribution, and thanks for being a part of Team Porter. Onward!
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14371?refcode=EMAF10_1_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=10&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=11&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=15617%2E3422442%2ELUBzn4)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Obama Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Open for an important message from President Barack Obama
body:

subject: [Survey] Your input is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Help me ensure our new House majority addresses your top priorities.
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=43f7668230ed4c1c956ee844e5ad2d11&_e=9HpaI4Gq9Q73jZ2n-jzSLlPY_IE3s8WG3s6pco7At2-g8wnxEgV9aVH76davwk1RVNciyrsMiyLSGiHw_8ErDOz8wRE8rrc2oqPAFY4PwOrJmRt8PyB_4t_me9_CszRmy9c84EMBxKMjMm3iLBXK7hTaIfHCUL3HlXJgd1QMFj7voDz-uBQpb_s83gLXgs9uHEy3vM-pdPlbEIicgwUqe6QP_IAoNUFdLya0Hw3mJnA0qTu_gb6uznA_Q1YiNjGyEiaNRDdqmz994jwhDmA13c458tABRGJS_HTHLiJzETBpn32qrAd4IYptOc6x3PcH3uug8wZREy3xQWaaDr7JRSJlJ7lU-jzmGkCXSzXqU14%3D)
---
Peter,
---
This past year you helped to elect a new House majority that you knew would fight for YOU.
---
That’s why as our new majority gets to work, I want to hear your top issues and concerns to ensure we are fighting for what this country needs every step of the way.
---
[**Please take my New House Majority Survey to ensure we address your priorities and continue to fight for YOU in Congress.**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=43f7668230ed4c1c956ee844e5ad2d11&_e=9HpaI4Gq9Q73jZ2n-jzSLlPY_IE3s8WG3s6pco7At2-g8wnxEgV9aVH76davwk1RVNciyrsMiyLSGiHw_8ErDOz8wRE8rrc2oqPAFY4PwOrJmRt8PyB_4t_me9_CszRmy9c84EMBxKMjMm3iLBXK7hTaIfHCUL3HlXJgd1QMFj7voDz-uBQpb_s83gLXgs9uHEy3vM-pdPlbEIicgwUqe5Vz-KaW-3Vf7L-YZy2RzBVMLwTQF6evUkCbZmgTWcfr5bJF-qJAY6FVg_wNdRUB0W6z4zi6so1L6rFmCsGIAutWUARjjrl6BzuiwlJK78LEAiGt8XZyvhLLyX-kWENpO2-2yIdczr6Ne6YHS07HASw%3D)

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=43f7668230ed4c1c956ee844e5ad2d11&_e=9HpaI4Gq9Q73jZ2n-jzSLlPY_IE3s8WG3s6pco7At2-g8wnxEgV9aVH76davwk1RVNciyrsMiyLSGiHw_8ErDOz8wRE8rrc2oqPAFY4PwOrJmRt8PyB_4t_me9_CszRmy9c84EMBxKMjMm3iLBXK7hTaIfHCUL3HlXJgd1QMFj7voDz-uBQpb_s83gLXgs9uHEy3vM-pdPlbEIicgwUqe6LBQocaq5--Da7Op2JxkW3GziAWDegHSgV5b4Y5n2CAHJgy87dTC_bAYB3Lz07q0q4CflMm2tL8k99OnCtlx1I7UkOrQ6xckTabZVs47gNdZLM2Nr3Nif598h-VcGwOinga9hFTEos8PruX7O9T8Qo%3D)
---

Our country faces multiple crises thanks to the Biden Administration such as high inflation, rising crime, and a wide-open border.
---
**And Americans like you are counting on us to get our country back on track.**
---
__By reclaiming the House majority, we have secured the critical check we needed on the Biden Administration’s disastrous and dangerous agenda to ensure a prosperous future for America._ _
---
But as we begin this new year with our new majority, it’s essential for our top priorities to be the issues and concerns of Americans like you, and that’s why I need you to complete my survey as soon as possible.

clean_body: Help me ensure our new House majority addresses your top priorities. | Peter, This past year you helped to elect a new House majority that you knew would fight for YOU. That’s why as our new majority gets to work, I want to hear your top issues and concerns to ensure we are fighting for what this country needs every step of the way. Our country faces multiple crises thanks to the Biden Administration such as high inflation, rising crime, and a wide-open border. And Americans like you are counting on us to get our country back on track. By reclaiming the House majority, we have secured the critical check we needed on the Biden Administration’s disastrous and dangerous agenda to ensure a prosperous future for America. But as we begin this new year with our new majority, it’s essential for our top priorities to be the issues and concerns of Americans like you, and that’s why I need you to complete my survey as soon as possible. Thank you, Rep. Scott Fitzgerald Wisconsin's 5th Congressional District Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress Po Box 5048 Elm Grove, WI 53122

This is long overdue... | | | Hi Peter – It's a new year, and an introduction is long overdue. We're grateful to have you on our team in 2023 and want to take some time to tell you about United Rural Democrats. We founded this organization to connect with voters across rural America, listen to their concerns, organize a Democratic movement, and elect people who will actually make change in their communities. It sounds simple, but trust us, it's hard work, Peter. We had huge successes in 2022, electing Democrats in rural areas up and down the ballot in races that both parties wrote off as going to Republicans. In a time when Republicans are failing to support the American people on issues like healthcare, affordable education, housing security, consumer prices, and job creation, Democrats connected with rural voters and are already making changes in statehouses and in DC. We're a small but mighty team – all from rural towns – who have traveled hundreds of thousands of miles to meet rural voters where they're at and build a grassroots network of Democrats. disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **FOR YOUR EYES ONLY: MESSAGE FROM SPEAKER MCCARTHY**
Friend, thanks to YOUR SUPPORT, Republicans have taken back the House and are ready to get to work for Americans across the nation.

But Biden has the White House & Schumer has the Senate. We are now the ONLY thing standing between the elitist radical agenda of Biden and hardworking Americans like you.

Whether or not we reach our fundraising goal by midnight tonight will define what happens for the next two years.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: WATCH: Recap of a history-making year.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAhEqs6AkSYBRHgC_6K6_YCXh8I_yDLECiNGvHRK2NL-IlgWBj9De5yoiTQerwXy6JA81pDwhTFASFFSIbV03-zQEH_mpw1UN78WAF-i6sXdZ8gThPlq_f4v4Je7xpPMe-uioy4PvR61WgndqNnVrQP2thIQTOcIO-aSUIkr2xPJu2oS-pq0QDRFg3NcAUnWFPAuYjlZHorgutkDXkpCJ_nKm-4D5sRvGDYhvMQuHauoOaHkhfWEJV-achXtJfEs7uNThS5MAbgnj7i8Y5Mi4rz28RcNKHXBcIc1l5R86EVLg_9MoORnbffQxVFeOz5P7nbM7Kh528gFbIN-mr5hohm3_adMqcFWbIrVXJfm0XY2A/3sq/BnOt71zWTKWGiflnQu30Mg/h0/hUeAZkCVBgcx59ovr1S9hJPsP_T70Dn11AzmNHKrnWo)
---
Peter, With 2022 in the rear-view mirror, my team and I are reflecting on everything we accomplished in the past year – the lessons we learned, and all the wonderful people we met as we campaigned across the 17th District. **We would be remiss if we didn’t recap some of the highlights, so we put together this short video.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCaMr9u82MCR-agyNljZof1_lJg4QayiFwXhhrTdfWlH1WfE6KUulzkmxFBtwdGonkN_jmBuRGvFMK06-AV3oy3yNHd9JlBZDnc8UO4CSfnhPP9WXpMBhRKeJQTRnF7Gt247zxAqC_6_yI7rDZQFmtz5W7MoFotnqMSsqmyUCS_PHTU6fcRwAZ1a0YoutC0x2xA1KBxmxeYXcLIE0pFcbTCPwZVhBkFJe0D_psjpRWJngUtOrFCIEBfIZleJyugob9k5RBngwHr-h78jvIibSJHrtyEOyiv22YIQRTyM6TOQPOfnRW0onwPIlhgoPoDQ8/3sq/BnOt71zWTKWGiflnQu30Mg/h1/qgwJ-qHdolzzS5P6-9r6qAaxFMo9GMXaV3UtEI-6jV0)
---
We launched a history-making campaign last year. Along the way, we collected thousands of signatures from community members to get me on the ballot. We met with heroes, like the armed services veterans from Honor Flight of the Quad Cities. We made the case for why we need a trusted local voice representing IL-17 in Congress. And ultimately, YOU elected Illinois’ first-ever openly LGBTQ representative to Congress. Thanks for standing with us during this exciting year. I look forward to our next two years in Congress and beyond. More soon, Eric
---

---
|
---
| Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
---

Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL running for U.S. Congress. body:
| |
---
| | | **FOR YOUR EYES ONLY: MESSAGE FROM SPEAKER MCCARTHY**
Friend, thanks to YOUR SUPPORT, Republicans have taken back the House and are ready to get to work for Americans across the nation.

But Biden has the White House & Schumer has the Senate. We are now the ONLY thing standing between the elitist radical agenda of Biden and hardworking Americans like you.

Whether or not we reach our fundraising goal by midnight tonight will define what happens for the next two years.

**We need 100 patriots from every zip code in the nation to step up by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

If we fail, the last two years will just look like a warmup when the devastating consequences of their radical policies hit home.
**Will you stand with us?**

---

clean_body: | | | Friend, You might not know that Nikki Haley LOVES birthdays. We want to surprise her with a very special birthday card signed by her top supporters, which is why we’re reaching out to you. We want to make sure you have a chance to sign Nikki Haley’s birthday card. But there are only 10 days left to sign her card, so if you want your name to make it on her card it’s important you sign soon. Make sure you sign her card, and if you have time, leave a message for her as well. Thank you for joining us in this celebration! Sincerely, Ken FarnasoPress Secretary Stand For America PAC | | | Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. ---
| | | Peter,

A lot of people are asking why I took such a strong stand last week in the vote to elect a new Speaker of the House.
---

_**It 's because I work for the people and the people alone.

I refuse all PACs - that means corporate PACs, Leadership PACs, and ideological PACs.

I refuse all federal lobbyist donations.

I believe no other Republican in Congress has such a policy. **_

I am 100% funded by the people because that's the **ONLY** constituency I swore to serve. I stood up for you when it mattered, and [_**now I 'm asking you to do the same by chipping in $25 today.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62185674:6KX-r-GNr:m:1:3331421248:B039E6068B26461269662C6CCE4F68CB:r)

body:

| | | Friend,

Heather and I are humbled at the number of incredibly generous supporters who showed up to join us last night as we kicked off our campaign for supervisor.

Believe me when I say, who runs your local communities matters. And last night's turnout showed me they know that, too.

It was an honor and privilege to represent you in the state legislature, and it would be an honor to represent you once again to help fight for real solutions to our most pressing issues.

In today's political environment, we need conservative fighters more than ever who will stand up for our conservative values, principles, and priorities - at every level of government.

Your support and [every dollar raised](https://foster2023.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5ee1b2f1627d322150edb995&id=b3f7ebffd1&e=7f8b4f6b16) helps make that happen.

Thank you, again.

We'll be in touch again soon!

Sincerely,

subject: To the Supreme Court we go

body:
it will be worth it.
it will be worth it.

| [ ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsp5diobau6j0dc1sqn6aftijbom6rmoqt34j6io_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge6oj4clh2bs)

---
Hey,

I wanted you to be the first to know:

**I have officially filed the petition to transfer my election case from Maricopa County to the State Supreme Court.
**
**[Rush a donation so we can keep pushing this case! They want us to stop but we must prove them WRONG.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zspbepgo07ouulfq0rlhnav1kuh740t294v78aa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge6oj4clh2bs)
**
The complete and utter CHAOS that was the Arizona governor election needs to be EXAMINED BY THE SUPREME COURT!

**I will not concede. Why? Because Katie Hobbs was not duly elected.
**
I believe in free and fair, honest, and transparent elections. And I will not stop fighting until we get those in Arizona. This is about making sure the voice of Arizona is heard

**_[Stop Katie Hobbs.
](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi9opgmjel7ouvjeru14uamesdmc6kcn512kanrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge6oj4clh2bs) [Stop the corruption.
](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfvublq4jn7ir8p4pnk60703obs4cj1g5g1nq7fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge6oj4clh2bs) [Restore America’s elections.
](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhk3a89av3holqg1rh2a6jfj0ag4md3emdevstuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge6oj4clh2bs) [Restore our voice.
](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znjfldioa5cl8419otmeu2j0j74f54ebuhko6ne8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge6oj4clh2bs) [Donate now if you’re with me.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgf356pk0lkhshcgbvrkj1cjktgu8nl2rqaa3b2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpge6oj4clh2bs)
_**
I know this is an uphill battle, but I promise you it will be worth it.

God bless,

Kari Lake

Peter, We’re firm believers that political conversation needs to be a two-way street. [**That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you to take our petition about the issues that are top of mind for you as we head into 2023. What issues do you want your representatives focused on as we head into the new year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57141743/387008635/931241712?refcode=230110-PET&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzk3ZWU2Ni0wNjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-cIMITW0NAxtdcqvqgzY-93snY3RFzvPKeJ58flchmo=&emci=e2c4bb3b-ed90-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9c97ee66-0691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) In 2022, Indiana Democrats delivered economic opportunity in all 92 counties and historic investments to fix our nation’s crumbling infrastructure and the rising cost of goods. clean_body: | Peter, We’re firm believers that political conversation needs to be a two-way street. In 2022, Indiana Democrats delivered economic opportunity in all 92 counties and historic investments to fix our nation’s crumbling infrastructure and the rising cost of goods. We were able to deliver real results for Hoosier families and as we turn the page, we’re focused on delivering for you and your community. But in order to do that, we need an understanding of what problems are keeping you up at night. As we get closer to two decades of Republican state administrations, Democrats are fighting an uphill battle to restore balance in our state government. We bring balance by hearing from supporters like you. Thanks, Indiana Dems | | | = | = [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: Join the America First Club and be a proud representative of your community

body:
Congratulations! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7704%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=RIjrVCQK9gB6Fw9NRGbWpw&sysid=1)
Congratulations!

| [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91960%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g9%2fMwLVYBF4oxkECHvWhSA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow Conservative, We are writing to you today with an urgent and exclusive opportunity to join the America First Club. **[This invitation is only extended to the most dedicated and patriotic members of our party, and we are proud to count you among them.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91961%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XXye%2bnjEzLcCVJfQZl2GMQ&sysid=1)** As a member of the [America First Club](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91962%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8je2kAY1%2bU99AbUdJetT1g&sysid=1), you will have access to exclusive events, meet-and-greets with top Republican leaders, and behind-the-scenes updates on the latest Republican initiatives. You will also be invited to participate in important policy discussions and have a say in the direction of our party. But the benefits of membership go beyond just access and involvement. As a member of the America First Club, you will be demonstrating your commitment to the values that our party holds dear: America first, small government, individual liberty, and strong national defense. You will be joining a community of like-minded individuals who are working together to advance these principles and make America great again. **[We are confident that you will see the value in joining the America First Club, and we urge you to chip in any amount to accept your membership and join us today. The deadline to join is 11:59 PM TONIGHT, so don't delay.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91963%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JaVvQHNCXE8HotVMOXDK2A&sysid=1)** |

name: Jan 6 Update [Left Action]
subject: Add your name: Tell the Senate to continue the Jan 6 investigation
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Tell the Senate to finish the work of the House January 6th Committee >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71f5ecf7-075f-4592-81cd-b8792f16b92b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2ccd710-9cb4-418d-9426-3ba3cba39cea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The House January 6th Committee officially disbanded when the new Republican Congress was sworn in. After a thorough 18-months long investigation into the deadly Capitol insurrection, they did the right thing and recommended the Department of Justice pursue multiple criminal charges against Trump. But there are still many unanswered questions about what happened on January 6th, 2021 – related to our national security. For instance, why the FBI failed to act on warnings of violence and rioters. Senate Democrats should pick up where the House Jan 6 Committee left off and continue the investigation – for the sake of our democracy and to prevent future tragedies like this. [Sign your name: Tell the Senate to finish the work of the House January 6th Committee >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb434bd5d-df0d-4da8-bb2f-fd602596376d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

body:

| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11168/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/451162ceaddec14cb625b21376163fd92f0caa61). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

Greetings friend!

When I left my house this morning, a blast of cool 19 degree wind blasted me in the face, tracing its way around my ears!

Talk about being caught off guard!

Then I realized...

I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck...

I quickly pulled it up over my head and within seconds I was protected from that nasty NYC winter gust.

Let me tell you...

[Tactical Balaclavas](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11168/6374453/f9c14dc330220fd6768a3c7ae9fbbe501578a3ac/451162ceaddec14cb625b21376163fd92f0caa61) are an absolute necessity for any outdoor enthusiast.

They’re made of durable, breathable material and designed to protect your head and neck from harsh weather. And they can be worn several different ways, depending on the style you’re going for.

They’re also a solid solution for protection against UV rays, bugs, and other outdoor annoyances.

I love mine and it goes with me almost all the time.

And right now, Gunner Gear has a steal running for the holidays...

[If you buy one balaclava, they’re giving away an additional 3 (THREE) for FREE! ](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11168/6374453/f9c14dc330220fd6768a3c7ae9fbbe501578a3ac/451162ceaddec14cb625b21376163fd92f0caa61)

That’s unheard of and an untouchable deal!

For real, hurry up before they run out...

With the holidays here, tactical enthusiasts are snagging them up quick!

Don’t lose out, [go here now](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11168/6374453/f9c14dc330220fd6768a3c7ae9fbbe501578a3ac/451162ceaddec14cb625b21376163fd92f0caa61) and get some for yourself and your friends.

All the best,

clean_body: | | | | | | | Untitled Document Friend, The Democrats set a dangerous precedent \- one they will soon regret \- when they voted to release my tax returns. This decision was nothing more than a continuation of their vendetta against ME. They forget that before stepping into the political arena tosave our Country, I spent my entire life building one of the greatest companies in the world. In short, I have achieved theAmerican Dream beyond all imagination. Most politicians only know how to KILL jobs (re: Joe Biden) - I have actually CREATED them. In an outrageous but unsurprising abuse of power, the Radical Democrat Congress illegally obtained and leaked my tax returns - which only show that I’ve had tremendous success. The seizure of these confidential records was completely unconstitutional : there was NO legitimate legislative purpose for their action whatsoever. It is nothing but another deranged political witch hunt. I trust what YOU think, Friend, which is why I’m asking you to go on record by answering the quick poll below: The Radical Democrats’ behavior is a shame upon the U.S. Congress. This precedent must now be applied to the Corrupt Democrats themselves. The Washington Swamp is deep and unbelievably corrupt - which is why it is so determined to stop the one person (ME) who will clean up their corruption once and for all. When I am the 47th President of the United States, I promise you that we will EXPOSE the Washington cartel - and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. Thank you, Donald J. Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Sam C. via Democrats.org
subject: Where does your money really go?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
The DNC is funded by grassroots donors, but what does that really mean? And what does your donation actually do? Let’s break it down and talk about it! | |
---
Derek -- Sam here. We’re off to a great start this year in no small part because of this team! I hope you’ll give me a few minutes to explain exactly what a donation to the DNC helps support, and **[consider making a gift today.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJCWzcNKSPMWWwCLey7mifNCOjqCfooXk2Mo6QxRWwtbNG78JLXguo9M6MXroztmWS-K_gR9l-eVIvioIKDA3H31IEupcbubl5l3JfjvzjTtdhg7K71ET_mMNcsp-sfIUUMJTEMw1zLDVGDH6yH7yN3-X04EwLVe5c9--5BoD0rXyFSz3zBjgCFj1fp5zgEP2DWxiw1IEppbH5Yxx4gOxYoxnhIdFbXteYpxPbcvCNXq3OaNvenuznOLxgCR9_7-neUsZjTacud0_fvf5sb0wwREvJmmu5XFZ1hLRtgVb_MdNGt6ynhNNvYLbGP5lXX-qntDk3nNnJKmTAMdqQzkifFLT3PvCjthFblUmRyquD1Ux3Gw6EZfqg2zmFl8OTDdku/3sq/363_PY-ITjaUB7Z7DrV_Tw/h0/x4-O9vagHqtuK2NJkjxx6d4Qkro74WNHPyVI7llCxxE)** The DNC is funded by grassroots donors, which means that folks chipping in $5, $10, or whatever they can afford, whenever they can, is how we power our important investments and programs across the country. Donations made to the DNC today help support four critical areas necessary to electing Democrats nationwide. Take a look:
1. **Campaigns and State Parties:** Donations help ensure our partners on the ground have everything they need to maintain strong and consistent resources and presence in every state. Every year, millions of dollars are given to guarantee investments in grassroots infrastructure such as staff, tools, local events, ads, and relevant programming.
2. **Innovative Organizing:** Take the first-of-its-kind Red State Fund. When you donate to the DNC, it’s this type of fund that puts Republicans on the defensive and builds tailored programs and political power across the country, including in traditionally red states, helping to ensure that Democrats _can_ compete and win everywhere no matter what.
3. **Voter Protection:** Thanks to this team, the DNC made historic investments in voter education, protection, registration, and the technology that powers it all. We now have a monitored voter assistance hotline, election toolkits, webinars that focus on protecting everyone’s voting rights, and legal help defending the right to vote in every election.
4. **State-of-the-Art Data and Technology Infrastructure:** Digital infrastructure powers nearly every Democratic campaign. This is the brain of the operation, but it requires investments that candidates don’t have at their disposal. _That’s where your support comes in:_ When you donate, the DNC can help effectively power these campaigns.

Grassroots donors are the heart of our party, Derek. You make all our work to elect Democrats more efficient, effective, and predictable. So, hopefully, it won’t come as a surprise that I am asking: **[Derek, can we count on you to make your first $7 donation of the year? When you donate today, you are not only supporting the DNC, but you’re also helping support Democrats nationwide.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJCWzcNKSPMWWwCLey7mifNCOjqCfooXk2Mo6QxRWwtbNG78JLXguo9M6MXroztmWS-K_gR9l-eVIvioIKDA3H31Pq1YFg1MZXSXhJGuceicx_t19fNZoKJ7sZp96coC9JLlLIUODyUP8C53OgnyzxsbsAZKewf5byNTiUeVthMUDtVv53DaZi3J7rYRe59dROmfxotdHWj40_YbV5jIbz-_okWuUCKhbzLn2YPP_cG6pRo0PRGKLk1one8OR-6SfZraB63IQqS5N9UAtBjiMvhUNZjMZZzKGn4oCTLLTD2VY9bQRn5HsZmbNbQQGcZQLlfoJ2oD_MJqx9ORIS7FguVcWlYXbd9HCeBunt6S2MHwRHBhGtIKdPPD9c1UnEt_Mt/3sq/363_PY-ITjaUB7Z7DrV_Tw/h1/hmYHcY-XFNwZVt70ttpIcqjVHKY3FXPsNvbYeDnOz3M)**
[ **DONATE** ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJCWzcNKSPMWWwCLey7mifNCOjqCfooXk2Mo6QxRWwtbNG78JLXguo9M6MXroztmWS-K_gR9l-eVIvioIKDA3H35sgAQ2cESguVI-slnLHyk3z6AZZxbRYZkBja0GTDiQzmJimUJeUtdVhbb0QdyNd7X0UYGIUrsMemWwixYH8FkozyF6h8lj8vDutvX_-24gP5dBFymyKm29JT9_QkbGIcvXU9vt3oAciKhb4YgdlbV3b3LBh1SXp1PWBVc-Vidsbpn_kEYHnDHSHmMlXvBNQWsrax0lClcyHG8KDOXx1CmK6ESxJ5lUTVzfN_Sr0FA6YW4SjbZC8KbF_vCKXWfumTuqEED2IGRvzvq1r_Yyz2O3_mMHVKqtxdm_TsRuwya5t/3sq/363_PY-ITjaUB7Z7DrV_Tw/h2/_ZWWsXKiv3GUgBJFd8-3T2rriAT3fpVaoga-SapZaxE)

Executive Director
Democratic National Committee

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, ****[submit this form to unsubscribe](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GK4M_KkRVst3AZYpe4G4V-fe8dMAM_szZCnbRvjMv0y1BgNSShSWUsvJPUgFSJI9gCcDG0P8YZSfuhUSLNygq_u8HW3QOH-9vahVzElma0MhxGZQO676g6sn9L-hz6UMrlbhRLWPzwV6yFchy0RES4_ICWLzqJx1BQJ9MZ8OyzlFGZ0IqT-xrlmCEZT_8YAr5_EiyasNE9_rGejSI6aVL1QOKUEdIDse9TbThFrcRqF3dsKnYGhUutNjJV4lIv7Bc44_TGBCSdmSEb4H4vAqC8nlcANlyjov2_-lELwQwRPyWB11SFEWXGvhvTWugWi-TjeuUjhRBs3Yh6Qpp9OmKM4osCNhTEMSIKsx1aPAahTROGtZCpr-CNkwlaYxvEA48/3sq/363_PY-ITjaUB7Z7DrV_Tw/h5/U4uANxvxBVJu6cFr_tt85SGdS6ELW1m13Q9P-eB28wk).****

If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., [**make a contribution today**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zpUw_e_EZxmgaVXIHsJiEjB23jDLEmy3JA8KeS6WrJiBfCgBrLos8_6nn5P-8kj8lDvEGK-b8N_BkdXhiuwJeIj7QTSqtyWNvEjzra7RedZ1LIAmgeJ89AucICDzTmkQugkpD1ukN7toUfsPFgpG2QXaqbgjyxb8DtuBlUhquBtE23BNTlq143g5uQslHrwdb8O1lbcspoo_kDijVMmQ7yE0DUeJ1mZPS_849iMP9BsAOPHuxTgS_DcAumpXMJPplYbowUBqDfcFYzSw470W0YGwDRcNokV1xnf1dC9w7dqsvrkySEnxtytItVrofzhPl4icvufBfvlvUj44XsPPIQ7HvOrmWCsK7FGe6k_4KyOZz0ltsClzgHS8qagQX3tEg/3sq/363_PY-ITjaUB7Z7DrV_Tw/h6/sXX0E7y7qQDDteSsL6f4OKgRpE2XajpDa6yQKlM-VRQ).

name: Team TNDP
subject: Here We Go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

Because of the Republican supermajority, the legislature convening is a frightening time for the people of Tennessee — and it begins today. Every year, Republicans block Democratic attempts to raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid, and fully fund our schools. They also have a plan of their own. Here's some of what we are bracing for from the TNGOP:

❌ Taking more money away from our public schools
❌ Kicking 300,000 people off of TennCare
❌ Stripping our local governments of their control
❌ Preventing gender affirming healthcare

We need more Democrats in the legislature, but we're not going to get there without support. And in the meantime, we're going to give Republicans a hell of a fight.

Help us push back against Republican extremism by chipping in now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

$5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
$25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

Democrats in the legislature are going to give it everything they've got during session. Our members plan on fighting for abortion rights, affordable child care, fully funding our public schools, raising the minimum wage, expanding Medicaid, and more. But the simple truth is that we need more friends in the legislature.

It is time to elect Democrats who will fight for Tennesseans. Will you donate $10 right now to help us build a fund to elect more Democrats in our legislature? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

We can do this if we do it together.

Forward,

Team TNDP

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party.Carol V. Abney, Treasurer.

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| STATEMENT FROM SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT
Today's State of the State speech by Governor Hochul follows the Senate Republicans' call for a safer, stronger and more affordable New York. While the Governor echoed our themes, she ignored the stark reality that one-party, progressive policies have made New York less safe and less affordable. New Yorkers deserve action that matches the rhetoric.
On issues like bail reform, mental health, housing and affordability, we hope the Governor will deliver real solutions for New Yorkers and ignore the hysterics from the progressive left.
Unfortunately, the Governor's speech included policies that will make life more difficult for struggling families and small businesses. Touting unachievable energy policies, new mandates on small business and state-driven housing policies will only drive up costs for overburdened New Yorkers, chasing out even more taxpayers and more jobs.
As we continue to examine the full details of her proposals, my Senate Republican colleagues and I are ready to take action on common-sense policies that make New York safer, stronger, more affordable and more free.

clean_body: January 1st, 2023 | | | | ---|--- | == | | | STATEMENT FROM SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT Today's State of the State speech by Governor Hochul follows the Senate Republicans' call for a safer, stronger and more affordable New York. While the Governor echoed our themes, she ignored the stark reality that one-party, progressive policies have made New York less safe and less affordable. New Yorkers deserve action that matches the rhetoric. On issues like bail reform, mental health, housing and affordability, we hope the Governor will deliver real solutions for New Yorkers and ignore the hysterics from the progressive left. Unfortunately, the Governor's speech included policies that will make life more difficult for struggling families and small businesses. Touting unachievable energy policies, new mandates on small business and state-driven housing policies will only drive up costs for overburdened New Yorkers, chasing out even more taxpayers and more jobs. As we continue to examine the full details of her proposals, my Senate Republican colleagues and I are ready to take action on common-sense policies that make New York safer, stronger, more affordable and more free. | | == | | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: == == == | | | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with

name: Jazz.Lewis@JazzLewis.com
subject: Before the legislative session begins
body:
Folks, after dedicating my life to the fight for social justice, it’s been my honor to serve in the Maryland House of Delegates. This session, I’m so proud to take on the role of House Majority Whip and continue the fight for a more just and equitable society.

I’m asking if you can give whatever you can right now so we can kick off this year strong and I can focus on the ambitious agenda we’ve put together for this session.

We need 17 more donations to meet our goal. Will you give what you can before tomorrow's deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode=Janemails]

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode=Janemails]

In a few hours, we will have to close the books on our first fundraising report of the year and once the General Assembly convenes, we won’t be able to fundraise at all. Coming from a family that worked hard to get into the middle class, my campaign relies on grassroots support to pay the bills.

Anything you can chip in before tomorrow at noon will go a long way! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode=Janemails]

Thanks for all you do,

Jazz

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=biobox_btn]
