name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93ab458f1fbe4ddba2e61568181a2964&_e=vdW-hpThwe_OH6Bo4wMpJbD7yImowAI_DvGNeAwll7mzD64wOC-SWHNOQ6mIP8RU2YVLcfsTEeYmplloDwTGFXQJsnCIpc765Q08LnMPy17Lc-BY_8ANRBTG6zrdlL3fwN8D7rhoNl7ReEsBZ6_cx723B8Z_dZcp90y7RDV6w7H1LHmHgx2aoMEBtIUNdYWpzxYcukfDA_UyKo2LObr1jV1CV9CY40RApoC97kLctTu5zMgUihU-8Ke6pY-3QyGrAhu9tgTEgfFgvuQEDSqZhmO49wrmFieu3Hj3ceJlfAioya5C5ROZWPscF3PtYPDZHWxmGQx-luBgxAXuDspJLtPiL1Hxn58UJG2utW4hZVwDxPWH0WqBUBujK1prRnNhuetwWNy78uk5gr8JMjLA8g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93ab458f1fbe4ddba2e61568181a2964&_e=vdW-hpThwe_OH6Bo4wMpJbD7yImowAI_DvGNeAwll7mzD64wOC-SWHNOQ6mIP8RU2YVLcfsTEeYmplloDwTGFXQJsnCIpc765Q08LnMPy17Lc-BY_8ANRBTG6zrdlL3fwN8D7rhoNl7ReEsBZ6_cx723B8Z_dZcp90y7RDV6w7H1LHmHgx2aoMEBtIUNdYWpzxYcukfDA_UyKo2LObr1jV1CV9CY40RApoC97kLctTu5zMgUihU-8Ke6pY-3QyGr-2ik5ITLSlrjN0nzz931zJRdCpDETIsmhPiOun-CLCfyfIWQZcfJiOy8oNURiMDXFk5kAjVe9sA8Fbx2Q6NI8k8dRGiKkA7oWyLiHK9T80IiCnUNg48X7ZKIExRPdDuS9nFa5hyIjyp8mB5VFaMggw%3D%3D) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: We need your help!
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| A common complaint among legislators is a lack of time to actually read bills. The tactic used by leadership in nearly every legislative body is to overwhelm legislators so they don't know what is in the bills. This leaves legislators simply following leadership and voting however they are told. One term used in the Mississippi House is "vote bottom right". If you look at the voting board in the House, you will see “Speaker” at the bottom right. Many legislators simply look at what the Speaker is doing and vote with him.When faced with over 2,500 bills during the 3 month legislative session, committee chairmen who refuse to provide agendas for bills being considered and a Speaker who regularly suspends the rules and brings up bills for a vote in hours instead of days, legislators are left voting for bills they have never read. Unfortunately, a large majority of legislators just don't care because they are too busy going to dinner and living the high life off of a lobbyist to spend time reading bills and making informed decisions. But there are a few of us who believe it is our job to be informed and make the best decision possible before casting our vote.When I first arrived at the Mississippi legislature, I was determined to read bills and know what I was voting for or against. I spent hours every night reading bills that were assigned to my committees only to find out the chairman wasn't considering any of the bills I had read. Experince helped me prepare. I learned to eliminate some bills authored by Democrats that were never going to pass and I learned to speed read bills by finding the underlined portions which indicate new language to a code section of law. But none of this solved the problem and completely helped me make informed decisions.So, I made an agreement with a couple of other legislators to divide the bills among ourselves. We would meet once or twice a week to discuss and inform each other about the bills we had read. While this method helped, we were still behind and found it impossible to read everything we needed to read. I'm pretty sure one of us made a statement similar to, “Reading these bills is a full-time job.”Rep. Joel Bomgar had the idea of hiring someone to read, grade, and rank bills. This “bill reader” would evaluate each bill based on a specific criterion and provide an analysis of each. This proved to be a huge help, allowing each participating legislator time to focus on amendments or other aspects to pass better legislation.This year the Mississippi Freedom Caucus has taken over the responsibility of hiring a bill reader and working with him to ensure we have the best information possible on which to make decisions. Now, because of you and your financial assistance, we have produced a website that is not only available to any legislator but also available to citizens who want to stay informed.This website keeps track of bills as they are filed and makes it to the House Calendar. Our bill reader reads each bill and grades the bill based on the criterion set out by the Freedom Caucus.Each bill is assigned a grade.
* Green - GOOD POLICY - advances freedom or limits government
* Yellow - does not offend our principles
* Red - BAD POLICY - violates our principles by limiting freedom or growing government

You are invited to keep track of bills as they make their way through the process, read the analysis of each bill and decide for yourself if the bill is good policy or bad policy.We want your feedback and insight into the decisions we make. Go to, [**www.FreedomVotes.ms**](https://www.FreedomVotes.ms)**** to find bills and read our analysis.If you have comments about a specific bill or you think we have missed something that would change the grade of a bill, please submit your comments by using the link below.[**Bill Reader Suggestions**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/bQB_OogSr0nVd80NrJWAhQ) We look forward to reading your opinions and insights as we work together to make Mississippi the best place to work, live, and raise a family.
---
| | [Donate to the Freedom Caucus ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/f6GaBMe52OPtZQbM_45kng)
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Oj90-2AKZM2gniwgf3E3iA) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c11486d936c48c0be6f0d1373c4d0a5&_e=sYiqk5hsIacz6j1UyebuIai5t7pj1anw66eJxwYZucYbBDvwWAHsYvzQ_7rU2PdtwfxnYZEgzPVIWuY3mnYnuAscXnFeTIFdXfxZzf43GJK2IukHygg6m5yQXU_6ThsL-BeE3ewEbQHgg-grW3IixfkrHReJTtcRcRne_G64P_uE3BTl7zaPtvA2wh_sm6yzyhmdUGuBfTvmFJig6-lEJ_1_2sknkyBl-Zc0z8uGpu4UpJgBDUzk5C2krUR0oMy-eDDVvfiVAVdTvzSesTRmp8PoV0ogMubuw1E9czu9BEBLqUcH-Pjs_DWmzmePKO3SDWZNrgEvvJ3Ng6S6eV-OhP5r3JuxH12b9Zs8G6oH6O-WvtEqFyaFaCJaHhIIzaVQ4h4STzatY-vfqfN3Q1-WkC3RNcHmgPdlIBW-xoqHzFE5XSCtYreOOBG6MxdqL1df)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c11486d936c48c0be6f0d1373c4d0a5&_e=sYiqk5hsIacz6j1UyebuIai5t7pj1anw66eJxwYZucYbBDvwWAHsYvzQ_7rU2PdtwfxnYZEgzPVIWuY3mnYnuAscXnFeTIFdXfxZzf43GJK2IukHygg6m5yQXU_6ThsL-BeE3ewEbQHgg-grW3IixfkrHReJTtcRcRne_G64P_uE3BTl7zaPtvA2wh_sm6yzyhmdUGuBfTvmFJig6-lEJ_1_2sknkyBl-Zc0z8uGpu4UpJgBDUzk5C2krUR0oMy-eDDVvfiVAVdTvzSesTRmp2wpGm37WR8x88KmfaasdH4-E0y5xJBmCL7eM0foWPju__JwJucBG_LQrtZ00ioxAZEn2nAX6IevybJbHoT8raOC_V6Ni2v1VHwBcsLUTuML7zeLpCztSFSL_GK1Qt7Bn6uPnrrEvYZGNWzVTHTqoj4_7GuC0C4eEWlVI5H5O45X)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c11486d936c48c0be6f0d1373c4d0a5&_e=sYiqk5hsIacz6j1UyebuIai5t7pj1anw66eJxwYZucYbBDvwWAHsYvzQ_7rU2PdtwfxnYZEgzPVIWuY3mnYnuAscXnFeTIFdXfxZzf43GJK2IukHygg6m5yQXU_6ThsL-BeE3ewEbQHgg-grW3IixfkrHReJTtcRcRne_G64P_uE3BTl7zaPtvA2wh_sm6yzyhmdUGuBfTvmFJig6-lEJ_1_2sknkyBl-Zc0z8uGpu4UpJgBDUzk5C2krUR0oMy-eDDVvfiVAVdTvzSesTRmpw7t7M4L2F9OUr8L1O-yXkJISJi2rKrnFhfDKANRJr1t2dG742HNRhyleL5P_PiQqfyHNdes3rVjNwMuCYyvIuk18oc_mF3_FadlthFDkLapCZS35fuJq-gF1vz1BQhI8jBzc87l5RM-a_lVs6_PVjjnbuoBA4m2OVdECblUq42d)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c11486d936c48c0be6f0d1373c4d0a5&_e=sYiqk5hsIacz6j1UyebuIai5t7pj1anw66eJxwYZucYbBDvwWAHsYvzQ_7rU2PdtwfxnYZEgzPVIWuY3mnYnuAscXnFeTIFdXfxZzf43GJK2IukHygg6m5yQXU_6ThsL-BeE3ewEbQHgg-grW3IixfkrHReJTtcRcRne_G64P_uE3BTl7zaPtvA2wh_sm6yzyhmdUGuBfTvmFJig6-lEJ_1_2sknkyBl-Zc0z8uGpu4UpJgBDUzk5C2krUR0oMy-eDDVvfiVAVdTvzSesTRmpz_LA3_lO1_5ccyfp1SGKJjZY2COnZDVZOGTmcbZSLwNnwdXIkYjAJeHZK3vW3z1O8sk2FtI-LkCZHJTBXlTlKA9mXFUJ22jQkqLsFDF5kIRR3BC16R1K4U2f3S8kE1CtjeIuvHiZ5vjfyaTcUmF3G9_SIFNB_BhNMP8bu98qwRn).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=67c77fe5d3fd44aa90e008f1c0dfce80&_e=wcWPrGAMoNLybrS7Cl1hvhnIBKWFUDBlzDeVspYpyHlugj0kbyClmya39TXc1ltQxXU3Qdt79TAH2eFqSeYI3BR6CmqyUvKF2JSYirMQBhCo-Kfhh_XrntPBF4_X1aFxrkd2TFUYOA6X7_bP8IJ7stkCD9PxENWCV13xbYl5Nbs3x-S-3Al66_VcY53JjGO3UZpBLzVqR5Iag5b2QFgT8kacwrZ8itYn3EEUPzh59sDHXuLLaZj8Y0LdfJOafLj0o5WImnT4_RtOTV_7QZ3MRzvTBJK1z0ZbQsJiicSsF0JH1_WO7BuEBPkSifcAtzFj6cPJQcrxVU_sd7iO7aUYZp6UaLV8BJNJqh8YoAt4wdvjE413Qbzj_BTYzIca8zzubaPZnfcvr8neTMufu_0JAg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=67c77fe5d3fd44aa90e008f1c0dfce80&_e=wcWPrGAMoNLybrS7Cl1hvhnIBKWFUDBlzDeVspYpyHlugj0kbyClmya39TXc1ltQxXU3Qdt79TAH2eFqSeYI3BR6CmqyUvKF2JSYirMQBhCo-Kfhh_XrntPBF4_X1aFxrkd2TFUYOA6X7_bP8IJ7stkCD9PxENWCV13xbYl5Nbs3x-S-3Al66_VcY53JjGO3UZpBLzVqR5Iag5b2QFgT8kacwrZ8itYn3EEUPzh59sDHXuLLaZj8Y0LdfJOafLj0sGzuAh3CsR2t9r99z1RDA5vJgVjLHEkFbVxr16navhqetctmjYruVWkZEoVeNG68L7QKM01oE5jvAL_vAOtSVx9fY_19VwbaIdM62UHEouAj3-THwXyCrxtj2qU89BtuVpxsD7aRneIw34pgGBZtXg%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=67c77fe5d3fd44aa90e008f1c0dfce80&_e=wcWPrGAMoNLybrS7Cl1hvhnIBKWFUDBlzDeVspYpyHlugj0kbyClmya39TXc1ltQxXU3Qdt79TAH2eFqSeYI3BR6CmqyUvKF2JSYirMQBhCo-Kfhh_XrntPBF4_X1aFxrkd2TFUYOA6X7_bP8IJ7stkCD9PxENWCV13xbYl5Nbs3x-S-3Al66_VcY53JjGO3UZpBLzVqR5Iag5b2QFgT8kacwrZ8itYn3EEUPzh59sDHXuLLaZj8Y0LdfJOafLj0aHWL1s5qgYwwUE246QN0T1oQeH2qPjLpyrJyFm9vEteMh5pJ3zAV9N7OxqepV-tZVrX_4rXY7vteBBj4UdSgNODmbjuS6qasR-t_Q5U-NP9yFMVyx6bVABtKEPE1awi-AQeNGpg4GcWlJ8-Mx-_9dw%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! name: Lauren with Team Veronica
subject: Why Biden chose El Paso
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
He saw our immigration challenges first-hand, and agrees we need to create legislation that will bring real change.

| |
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57145667/387023880/-1291653745?refcode2=80ffba51-1291-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&refcode=230110_lz_biden_visit_v3_i1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGZmYmE1MS0xMjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C7JZEb7J-JU5uYW9Gx9LUbwS0aB32i9pV0ohXB-Szw4=)** Friend, President Biden went to the border on Sunday and chose El Paso for the visit. I wanted to take time today to acknowledge how this came to be. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57145668/387023881/-1291653745?refcode2=80ffba51-1291-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&refcode=230110_lz_biden_visit_v3_i2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGZmYmE1MS0xMjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C7JZEb7J-JU5uYW9Gx9LUbwS0aB32i9pV0ohXB-Szw4=)** As with Vice President Kamala Harris’ visit to El Paso, **President Biden visited our city at the urging of Congresswoman Escobar**. It’s through Veronica’s persistence and her relentless dedication to bring leaders to our community that the Biden Administration made visiting El Paso a priority this week. This isn’t a new mission. Veronica has worked tirelessly to bring more than 20% of Congress to El Paso during her first two terms in office. Because she understands that seeing our immigration challenges first-hand is the key to creating legislation that will bring real change. **For Veronica, El Paso has always been a priority.** | _“They need a lot of resources. We’re going to get it for them.”_ _\- President Biden, after visiting El Paso_
---
President Biden’s visit to El Paso was historic, but there’s much more work to be done. Veronica is as dedicated as ever to finding lasting solutions to our broken immigration system. And she’ll work with any Member of Congress to move closer toward immigration reform.
President Biden’s visit makes one thing clear – **Veronica’s influence in DC means El Paso has a voice at the highest levels of government.**
I’ve seen first-hand the work she’s put in to make sure El Paso is heard. And it’s thanks to supporters like you that she’s able to be in DC. **Which is why I’m asking you to consider being an early supporter of Veronica’s 2024 campaign.**
With Republicans in control of the House, and their mission to vilify the border, we must protect Veronica’s seat and her crucial work. Giving her an early boost in fundraising will send a strong message to Kevin McCarthy and his extremist gang: _Veronica is our fighter!_
**[Will you stand with Veronica, friend?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57145669/387023882/-1291653745?refcode2=80ffba51-1291-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&refcode=230110_lz_biden_visit_v3_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGZmYmE1MS0xMjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C7JZEb7J-JU5uYW9Gx9LUbwS0aB32i9pV0ohXB-Szw4=)**

Which is why I’m asking you to consider being an early supporter of Veronica’s 2024 campaign. With Republicans in control of the House, and their mission to vilify the border, we must protect Veronica’s seat and her crucial work. Giving her an early boost in fundraising will send a strong message to Kevin McCarthy and his extremist gang: Veronica is our fighter! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = =_ — Lauren Zimmerman Campaign Manager, Team Veronica | Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. That's put a target on her back from Trump supporters who are preparing to spend millions to end her leadership. Can we count on you to stand with Veronica? = PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Veronica Escobar for Congress P. O. Box 3961 El Paso, TX 79923 United States

subject: It’s time to get to work
body:
Can I count on you? |

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ab4512e49539/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8112831?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/2024-war-chest?recurring=true&amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230103_lori_2023-war-chest

Peter,

I am proud to have been sworn in as your representative in Congress, and I am committed to working hard every day to serve you and all Oregonians to the best of my ability.

As you may know, the work of a Congresswoman never truly ends. Even as I get to work on the issues that matter most to our community, I am also preparing for the next election cycle. It may seem far off, but in the world of politics, it's never too early to start building a strong campaign.

That's why I am reaching out to ask for your support. I need a strong war chest to defend our seat and continue fighting for the values and priorities that we share. Can I count on your help? (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/2024-war-chest?recurring=true&amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230103_lori_2023-war-chest)
HELP BUILD OUR WAR CHEST (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/2024-war-chest?recurring=true&amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230103_lori_2023-war-chest)

Your contribution, no matter the size, will make a big difference as we gear up for the next campaign. With your help, I know we can build a campaign that will allow me to continue representing our community with integrity and dedication.

As your Congresswoman, I am committed to fighting for policies that benefit all of our community, including investing in infrastructure, providing parental choice in our schools, keeping our communities safe and defending our constitutional rights.

But to make progress on these and other important issues, I need your help.

Political campaigns can be expensive, and I will need resources to reach out to voters and share our vision for the future. That's where you come in, Peter. A contribution of $100 will help me build a campaign that is powered by people like you who care about our community and our future. (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/2024-war-chest?recurring=true&amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230103_lori_2023-war-chest)

I am confident that with your support, we can build a campaign that will allow me to continue representing our district with integrity and dedication. Will you join me in this effort by making a contribution today? subject: FWD: Did you hear the news?

body:
Friend, we can count on Republicans to start throwing their hats in the ring to run against me. We can also count on dark money to flood our race.
Back in 2012, I was called the “hunted Democrat” because Karl Rove, the Koch brothers, and a whole team of special-interest groups spent $40 million against me. That’s nothing compared to the $200 million that was spent on last year’s Ohio Senate race, and it’ll be nothing compared to what gets spent on our race over the next two years.
In order to keep up with the special interests, we need your help to raise enough to run a winning campaign from now until Election Day. Please chip in any amount you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230110?refcode=sbe230110]
With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Day one of our Senate campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy)
Derek, we’ll get straight to the point: Katie Porter is running for the U.S. Senate!
**We’ve set a goal of raising $1,000,000 today**. That’s not just an arbitrary number, and the amount we raise today will have a direct effect on the success of this entire campaign. **Explanation below, but**[if you’d like to chip in right now, you can do so with this link.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14538?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=2&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy)****
1. Reporting a strong fundraising number at the beginning of our campaign shows the strength of our movement. This can deter super PACs from spending money to boost our opponents and attack Katie.
2. Running a statewide campaign in the most populous state takes serious resources, and the donation you make today will give us the resources to begin reaching voters all across the state.
3. Katie doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Banks, Big Pharma, or Big Oil. Unlike most campaigns, we truly rely on grassroots supporters.

**[Become a Founding Donor today: you’ll help us reach our goal and start this campaign in a strong position.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14538?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=3&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14539?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=4&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy) [Donate $22 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14540?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=5&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14541?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=6&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14542?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14543?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=8&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14538?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=9&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy)
---
Katie’s running for Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. She’ll fight to protect our rights and stand up to corporate special interests. **[Check out this video to learn more about why she’s running and what she’ll fight for.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14640?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=10&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy)**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14640?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=11&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy)
Thanks for being a part of Team Porter!
—Team KP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=12&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=15640%2E3422442%2EHT9cyy)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Hail Mary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden’s ridiculous anti-America agenda – but if we miss our critical fundraising deadline

| |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=541812f871834b748f90371dd17b0b33&_t=JdgxBjCBjuMBqWvgfPPWn2hYu7rcmrMjPFeJ5HUwx2wWt4RAZq97kt9pv6izkO2Y1zS-4oyOBAxcnsZeGLwbmfsXltO5S1zPrcymXH4ch-0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=541812f871834b748f90371dd17b0b33&_t=JdgxBjCBjuMBqWvgfPPWn2hYu7rcmrMjPFeJ5HUwx2wWt4RAZq97kt9pv6izkO2Y1zS-4oyOBAxcnsZeGLwbmfsXltO5S1zPrcymXH4ch-0%3D)

|
Peter, Kevin McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - but if we miss our critical fundraising deadline _we are going to fail._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans today to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

body:
I’m ready to go to the mat. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57177070/387056424/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDEzMDA3Yy0zZjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqwltX7byAPEmVqz3V8Dq_9v7ZWLCUxKNL5uCBvg-hk=&emci=4decd94c-2091-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9413007c-3f91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=252045)

It’s been quite a week, folks! While House Republicans took 15 attempts to even agree on who should be their Speaker, we kicked off the 118th Congress last week with a Democratic Senate majority. We started by making history — electing Senator Patty Murray as the first woman Senate president pro tem. I’m ready to go to the mat to secure policies to address climate change, support reproductive rights, expand voting rights, and lower costs for New Mexicans and folks across the country. But first, I’m back home to hear directly from New Mexicans about the issues they need us to tackle next. I’ve already started working with the newly all-Democrat New Mexico congressional delegation to ensure that New Mexicans impacted by the devastating Hermit’s Peak/Calf Canyon Fire have the resources they need to claim the assistance Congress authorized last year. My work will continue until every single New Mexican knows they are heard. I will never play political games. That’s why it’s so important I can keep fighting for New Mexicans in the Senate alongside a Democratic majority. **_But House Republicans’ spectacle last week was a preview of what’s to come if they take back the Senate, too._** **Can you help my campaign lay the foundation to keep the Senate in Democratic hands and support my work for New Mexico? clean_body: I’m ready to go to the mat. It’s been quite a week, folks! While House Republicans took 15 attempts to even agree on who should be their Speaker, we kicked off the 118th Congress last week with a Democratic Senate majority. We started by making history — electing Senator Patty Murray as the first woman Senate president pro tem. I’m ready to go to the mat to secure policies to address climate change, support reproductive rights, expand voting rights, and lower costs for New Mexicans and folks across the country. But first, I’m back home to hear directly from New Mexicans about the issues they need us to tackle next. I’ve already started working with the newly all-Democrat New Mexico congressional delegation to ensure that New Mexicans impacted by the devastating Hermit’s Peak/Calf Canyon Fire have the resources they need to claim the assistance Congress authorized last year. My work will continue until every single New Mexican knows they are heard. I will never play political games. That’s why it’s so important I can keep fighting for New Mexicans in the Senate alongside a Democratic majority. But House Republicans’ spectacle last week was a preview of what’s to come if they take back the Senate, too. Can you help my campaign lay the foundation to keep the Senate in Democratic hands and support my work for New Mexico? Your donation of $10 or any amount today will go a long way: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Let’s raise money for flood victims in California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| My thoughts today are with the thousands of Californians experiencing extreme rainfall and flooding, who have endured power outages to their homes and businesses, as a brutal storm ravages the Golden State. Tragically, lives have already been lost.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1564%2E5257348%2E0JLIx4)
**[Can you rush an urgent donation of any amount to support flood victims in California? Your contribution can make a real difference in people’s lives>>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em_cafloods.-7DFuV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_CHA_RES_AC_20230110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1564%2E5257348%2E0JLIx4)**
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em_cafloods.-7DFuV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_CHA_RES_AC_20230110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1564%2E5257348%2E0JLIx4)
Derek, my thoughts today are with the thousands of Californians experiencing extreme rainfall and flooding, who have endured power outages to their homes and businesses, as a brutal storm ravages the Golden State. Tragically, lives have already been lost.
The National Weather Service reports rainfall in California in excess of _600%_ above average — yet another indicator of the extreme weather California and the rest of the country have to suffer as a result of climate change.
Many regions are under evacuation orders, and for the average family, having to unexpectedly draw on funds for temporary shelter, food, and other necessities can stretch their bank accounts and credit limits to the breaking point.
**That’s why supporting the work of organizations like the American Red Cross Gold Country Region and United Way of Greater Los Angeles is so crucial right now — they help connect flood victims with shelter, clothing, food, and anything else folks may need.**
**[You know the impact this team can have when we come together for one purpose, which is why today, I’m asking you to contribute $10 to the American Red Cross Gold Country Region and United Way of Greater Los Angeles so that we can be there for the hundreds of thousands of flood victims in California who need our support. Your contribution makes a real difference — thanks so much for your help.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_cafloods.sCRY6w&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_CHA_RES_AC_20230110_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1564%2E5257348%2E0JLIx4)**

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Introducing my first bill: the McCarthy Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57146641/387026934/1850399781?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230110firstbill_gv_od90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODgwMmY2Yi0xODkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwdedVzlsw9WWCBbVPuvqhR8Z4kSpaGevq2axwH6_bw=)
---
Friend, I’m thrilled to share that this week **I’m introducing my very FIRST piece of legislation in Congress** , and it’s meant to prevent last week’s GOP circus from happening again. Last week, House Republicans wasted our first week in office with a political dog and pony show, taking five days to elect a Speaker and finally swear us into office. We should have been working on legislation to help those who elected us, but instead, the GOP wasted taxpayer dollars with grandstanding and in-fighting that got so bad it almost turned into a brawl on the House floor. **That’s why I’m introducing the McCarthy Act: a bill that will delay the start of House members’ paychecks in a new Congress until after a Speaker is chosen.** My bill will prevent a stunt like this from happening in the future by ensuring members who are responsible for stalling work aren’t getting paid for it – it’s just common sense. [**I would be honored to have your support on my first piece of legislation. Will you add your name to support the passage of the McCarthy Act today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57146642/387026935/-660709808?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230110firstbill_gv_od90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODgwMmY2Yi0xODkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwdedVzlsw9WWCBbVPuvqhR8Z4kSpaGevq2axwH6_bw=&emci=5e334b64-1891-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=18802f6b-1891-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4482565) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57146643/387026936/-660709808?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230110firstbill_gv_od90ds_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODgwMmY2Yi0xODkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwdedVzlsw9WWCBbVPuvqhR8Z4kSpaGevq2axwH6_bw=&emci=5e334b64-1891-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=18802f6b-1891-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4482565)
---
Thanks for making your voice heard alongside mine and holding those in power accountable to the people!
— Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e1dc5bff114953a44f7e3fad2de3c5&_e=G6_TeeU6kmlw4CFNtDTmV0wFbS_BaTnwFQmASns9DwiQOObj-fe9XWaWJ99_xSiIatt8jyQbNsZ5qy2asnXF2282pcwA1DMQKTvnkBIoIl9mZK8-GQTbGAWZP_bocYdGYVTxqJfyd_7cqtcOfYuW49LNUX5H9r8azNSEOssOkZQP7bZIIvLAasGATdnXgqwiSxq_nrRZBQ-vOHohLiTZisd3XhjSTMTj9gd-rv3dJHUzNlYspCIwW6kipc4GEXr9pTmZgFNi8qLkp_BfRiTyQFLF9U0wECOUJLzcYz5VNkU%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e1dc5bff114953a44f7e3fad2de3c5&_e=G6_TeeU6kmlw4CFNtDTmV0wFbS_BaTnwFQmASns9DwiQOObj-fe9XWaWJ99_xSiIatt8jyQbNsZ5qy2asnXF2282pcwA1DMQKTvnkBIoIl9mZK8-GQTbGAWZP_bocYdGYVTxqJfyd_7cqtcOfYuW4zc4XyRaU4NV5IZZaGUXrUgs0krpgkWBUCcnCGhXYBsNTsJhrIOktN8JGe0vnj59KVF2bfHHO-lwsoaMpMnoOWsPT07R5DqrQ1MjBfCBNyE2UJwwo0D8ZfATmrakbKw6FC73QuU3gOPHGozMYWt10Bw%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e1dc5bff114953a44f7e3fad2de3c5&_e=G6_TeeU6kmlw4CFNtDTmV0wFbS_BaTnwFQmASns9DwiQOObj-fe9XWaWJ99_xSiIatt8jyQbNsZ5qy2asnXF2282pcwA1DMQKTvnkBIoIl9mZK8-GQTbGAWZP_bocYdGYVTxqJfyd_7cqtcOfYuW4_mUalvEHyjcCxUEURR5CQAuDdAAr3cERW-Jqpn9ILBsYGuEJsSRQ8mR_fnMY7-4vGeuMR4Mb4Kj3dChR_SqHCwGdOoV_JMbeFFnF61bk9u6g0PYdsLTCXgk2ppHgpmudd1qwF35uhh203ldSb_4BEg%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e1dc5bff114953a44f7e3fad2de3c5&_e=G6_TeeU6kmlw4CFNtDTmV0wFbS_BaTnwFQmASns9DwiQOObj-fe9XWaWJ99_xSiIatt8jyQbNsZ5qy2asnXF2282pcwA1DMQKTvnkBIoIl9mZK8-GQTbGAWZP_bocYdGxf5nh-uU_cA7sFntD3b9R6ywSEgoRfig3PsLqH1Mtfkh8DnE8O4Qwq5oXg06zsDtWm_Mr3TXaxdliKWZLowyQ4QVNdIb_Kz1RfDbvKsFhed_p3WV_DciqPbai3Y_JPA0rm1VkgModwY8KiJqTR4_saxbaALEmT8zEGfxct3Exnk%3D)

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. body:

Peter, Since Kyrsten Sinema took office in 2018, she’s taken care of private equity billionaires, Wall Street, special interests, Mitch McConnell – basically everyone but the people who got her elected. >> She continues to uphold the filibuster instead of saving abortion rights, voting rights, our planet, and our democracy – empowering Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party at everyone else’s expense. >> She’s done Wall Street’s bidding time and again. Including saving the carried interest loophole–an $18 BILLION per year gift to Wall Street. Of course, she’s also received millions in Wall Street campaign donations. >> She spends more time with donors (and her masseuse!) than constituents–not to mention she’s held ONE town hall during her entire tenor. (Seriously, she schedules a one hour massage every week but instructs her staff to leave only one 30 minute window per week for constituents - no more than 3 minutes per constituent.) Is it any wonder that Sinema’s popularity continues to plummet? **** Help us boot her from office - and make sure that it’s a Democrat, not a Republican, who replaces her. Of course, she’s also received millions in Wall Street campaign donations. >> She spends more time with donors (and her masseuse!) than constituents–not to mention she’s held ONE town hall during her entire tenor. Members of Congress should be held to the highest ethical standards | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57177565/387067954/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdhOWVjYS00NjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HVlvBv8XahjnGYMtV7s6X4-5ocApZ0eJdovY7ArkzOk=&emci=d7cd6e27-3691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=527a9eca-4691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter: **The first thing Republicans did once they took the House majority was gut the Office of Congressional Ethics. ** Last night, House Republicans passed a rules package that will severely weaken the ability of the Office of Congressional Ethics (OCE) to investigate members of Congress for potential wrongdoing – something I still cannot wrap my head around. House Republicans have now made it almost _impossible_ for the Office of Congressional Ethics to hire staff, and to actually investigate any ethical issues in Congress. Some of the members of the House Republican caucus are currently under ethics investigations. **This is plainly a way to avoid accountability and will assuredly lead to more corruption. ** [**If you think that members of Congress should be held to a high standard of ethics, sign my petition now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57177566/387067955/-255901951?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdhOWVjYS00NjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HVlvBv8XahjnGYMtV7s6X4-5ocApZ0eJdovY7ArkzOk=&emci=d7cd6e27-3691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=527a9eca-4691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57177567/387067956/-255901951?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdhOWVjYS00NjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HVlvBv8XahjnGYMtV7s6X4-5ocApZ0eJdovY7ArkzOk=&emci=d7cd6e27-3691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=527a9eca-4691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) Political posturing and back-door deals like this are exactly the reason why so many Americans do not trust their elected officials and become apathetic towards our entire political process as a result. If we want Americans to engage in our democracy, _then they need to trust that those in power will not rig the rules in their favor._**As a member of Congress, I will fight to make sure that equity, transparency, and justice are written into all of our laws – including those that regulate Congress.** [**Sign on now to condemn the gutting of the Office of Congressional Ethics and demand that members of Congress are held accountable for their conduct!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57177568/387067957/-255901951?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdhOWVjYS00NjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HVlvBv8XahjnGYMtV7s6X4-5ocApZ0eJdovY7ArkzOk=&emci=d7cd6e27-3691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=527a9eca-4691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57177569/387068039/-255901951?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdhOWVjYS00NjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HVlvBv8XahjnGYMtV7s6X4-5ocApZ0eJdovY7ArkzOk=&emci=d7cd6e27-3691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=527a9eca-4691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) Thank you, Becca Balint

clean_body: Members of Congress should be held to the highest ethical standards | | Peter: The first thing Republicans did once they took the House majority was gut the Office of Congressional Ethics. Last night, House Republicans passed a rules package that will severely weaken the ability of the Office of Congressional Ethics (OCE) to investigate members of Congress for potential wrongdoing – something I still cannot wrap my head around. House Republicans have now made it almost impossible for the Office of Congressional Ethics to hire staff, and to actually investigate any ethical issues in Congress. Some of the members of the House Republican caucus are currently under ethics investigations. This is plainly a way to avoid accountability and will assuredly lead to more corruption. Political posturing and back-door deals like this are exactly the reason why so many Americans do not trust their elected officials and become apathetic towards our entire political process as a result. If we want Americans to engage in our democracy, then they need to trust that those in power will not rig the rules in their favor.As a member of Congress, I will fight to make sure that equity, transparency, and justice are written into all of our laws – including those that regulate Congress. Thank you, Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P.O. Box 291, Burlington, VT, 05402

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Why am I considered extreme?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
People lie about me a lot.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230110-3778-header&t=1&akid=3778%2E2526796%2EPym2d1)
Here’s a question I get a lot: “Why are you considered to be extreme?”
I am considered “extreme” because:
– I believe in Medicare for All,**aka guaranteed healthcare in the United States**.
– I authored the **Green New Deal** , and believe tackling the climate crisis will take a much more massive and serious mobilization than what we’re doing now.
– Although I am a Democrat,**I operate independently from either party’s establishment**. So I am willing to challenge my own party’s leadership and, when necessary, break from the party line.
– I do not believe in late stage capitalism or that prioritizing the extreme pursuit of profit at any and all human/environmental costs will save us.**I believe in cooperative economics and cooperative democracy, aka democratic socialism.**
– My campaign is funded by grassroots, small-dollar donations and I accept $0 in corporate money (the average donation to keep me in office is around $16).
– I believe that ICE, an agency that was just formed in 2003 during the Patriot Act era, is **a rogue agency that should not exist**.
– I am the youngest woman in U.S. history to be elected to Congress. I was a waitress. I am Latina. I come from a low income background and am one of just a few working class people who got elected to Congress. **That makes a lot of classist, ageist, misogynist, and racist people mad.**
People like to lie about and caricature me a lot, which makes folks believe all sorts of things that aren’t true!
**But together, we’ve built a movement fighting for each and every one of these issues — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.**
[If you’d like to help support our movement this year, could you donate $16 or anything you can afford right now to keep our movement strong? Your donation sustains our movement and keeps our team of dedicated organizers doing their work for a dignified wage. Make your $16 donation here today:](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230110.4znx2S&refcode=em20230110-3778-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3778%2E2526796%2EPym2d1)
**[Contribute $16](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230110.4znx2S&refcode=em20230110-3778-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3778%2E2526796%2EPym2d1)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230110?refcode=em20230110-3778-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&refcode2=3778_2526796_Pym2d1&akid=3778%2E2526796%2EPym2d1)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230110-3778-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&akid=3778%2E2526796%2EPym2d1)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=3778%2E2526796%2EPym2d1) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=3778%2E2526796%2EPym2d1) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=3778%2E2526796%2EPym2d1)

body:
In light of her decision to step down from leadership, we want to thank Speaker Nancy Pelosi for her years of service and congratulate her on everything she has accomplished as Speaker of the House. Sign our thank you card today!

Peter, we’re asking 5,000 Democrats to sign on before we send the card tomorrow at noon. Please, chip in $3 now to thank Speaker Nancy Pelosi » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q12023_ltr-pelosi?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100]

SIGN OUR THANK YOU CARD TO SPEAKER NANCY PELOSI BY CHIPPING IN $3 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q12023_ltr-pelosi?amount=3]

**THIS LETTER WILL BE SENT ON 1/11 AT 12 PM EST. PLEASE SIGN NOW**

To: Speaker Nancy Pelosi
From: Peter Willis
I’m SO thankful for EVERYTHING you’ve done as Speaker of the House.
In spite of Republican hate, you’ve stood for peace and progress.
In spite of Republican incompetence, you’ve pushed for common sense.
In spite of the Republicans' regressive agenda, you’ve championed the bold, progressive policies we need.
We know it MUST be EXHAUSTING to fight against CONSTANT GOP attacks.
Even still, you’ve TIRELESSLY represented us against their lies, and I can’t thank you enough for all of the work you’ve done.
That’s why I’m signing this thank you letter and donating $3 today to help fight back against MAGA Republicans aiming to destroy your legacy. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q12023_ltr-pelosi?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100]
SIGN OUR THANK YOU CARD TO SPEAKER NANCY PELOSI BY CHIPPING IN $3 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q12023_ltr-pelosi?amount=3]
Thank you,
Peter Willis
** SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION **

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Please read: Your 2023 LCV membership. This is important.
body:
__Your support will go three times as far for a limited time. |
---

|
Peter -- we've just kicked off our 2023 Membership Drive, and at LCV, this is an important one. How many members pitch in this month determines how big our campaigns can go to defend our planet for _all_ of 2023 -- _**and a group of donors has agreed to triple match every membership contribution this month.

Right now, there's truly an urgent need:**_

Republican leaders have promised corporate interest groups they'll try to pass a dirty energy bill that would set back the transition to renewables. After retaking a narrow majority in the House and finally picking a Speaker, we've received word it could be one of the first bills they attempt to pass.

If they get this polluter handout through the House, we HAVE to block them in the Senate.

The best thing YOU can do to stop them right now: Fund hard-hitting environmental campaigns. [Become an LCV member today for just $5 and 3X your impact.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2-ZN_C-)

Last year -- thanks to LCV members -- our historic campaign for climate action succeeded in passing historic climate legislation.**Now, we have to fight _just as hard_ to preserve that progress.**

| | **
** **JUST ANNOUNCED: League of Conservation Voters 2023 Membership Drive**

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Match Status: [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Deadline: January 31, 2023
Fundraising Goal: $35,000

**Member Status:**[EXPIRED -- claim your LCV membership today -- it only costs $5 right now](https://links.messages.lcv.)**** |
---|---|---

This is just the beginning, Peter. Republican legislators and their Big Oil allies are plotting to unravel _years_ of progress in the fights against climate change and environmental racism. **Everything we 've achieved -- _it could all be on the chopping block._**

We can stop this if we get active and stand together. We're going to raise hell until the environmental community is heard. We're meeting with key legislators, driving thousands of letters into Capitol Hill, and rallying voters to oppose any attempts to turn back the clock on climate action.

How big our campaign can go depends on the support of our members. We need to pull out all of the stops. So we're asking: [claim your LCV membership today for just $5. For a limited time, a group of generous donors will TRIPLE every gift to jumpstart our campaign.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2-ZN_C-)

Thank you for standing with us at this important moment.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
LCV

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9080644&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDIzNzY5OAS2&spReportId=MTY2MDIzNzY5OAS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9080644&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDIzNzY5OAS2&spReportId=MTY2MDIzNzY5OAS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMX-) |

Everything we 've achieved -- it could all be on the chopping block.** We can stop this if we get active and stand together. We're going to raise hell until the environmental community is heard. We're meeting with key legislators, driving thousands of letters into Capitol Hill, and rallying voters to oppose any attempts to turn back the clock on climate action. How big our campaign can go depends on the support of our members. We need to pull out all of the stops. So we're asking: Thank you for standing with us at this important moment. Onward, Gene Karpinski President LCV | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, . from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback mailto:feedback@lcv.org, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. |

subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c7e085eb5446bf886d78e127ddb357&_e=ZMYxjo6jHH5Ex_6BfwkJyeMjd-PnaNxKe8YZgNir01D78fKWW3uJW9oH_Wg79ivHzcZFVKOYnoemzF7r6MPP5cEqxTG5yWgzYGCUwIT1FN9NEXbdxxIUBQh3HuVy9avCbM4gESobWdS-FIRL6vkwuRGPLF53WR5n_t_fY6HPEm6JoqzeVoCmY-T2BfnMwPHi9Zn8VJU3VYzou61QFCdwfZ8EoFqK5vBoKERqB9pYlKViaHhgCiPVfCaobc6L_LNT5vpwiajYiR27ZZcnZfsSwhsJMkAArkN9dzRRyCVCa3O8hYkJ1eJHx-nBY_TJVc69bEVYpG9Ncpc54kAT-jC6pw%3D%3D)

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c7e085eb5446bf886d78e127ddb357&_e=ZMYxjo6jHH5Ex_6BfwkJyeMjd-PnaNxKe8YZgNir01D78fKWW3uJW9oH_Wg79ivHzcZFVKOYnoemzF7r6MPP5cEqxTG5yWgzYGCUwIT1FN9NEXbdxxIUBQh3HuVy9avCbM4gESobWdS-FIRL6vkwuRGPLF53WR5n_t_fY6HPEm6JoqzeVoCmY-T2BfnMwPHiZ7LuT3EXZbhpoCpcE_W8PPqvFKLI_eXBvGzVkC0J24hP2rGcB22045EyG5LSobSOQbdvQnGxatFqm3CT_u01mWkyZFBB70ssaJ6jDMozgfJCWTknWCIYrl6AyJfwk231O3zD6PjraFmIytZI-4_L7A%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c7e085eb5446bf886d78e127ddb357&_e=ZMYxjo6jHH5Ex_6BfwkJyeMjd-PnaNxKe8YZgNir01D78fKWW3uJW9oH_Wg79ivHzcZFVKOYnoemzF7r6MPP5cEqxTG5yWgzYGCUwIT1FN9NEXbdxxIUBQh3HuVy9avCbM4gESobWdS-FIRL6vkwuRGPLF53WR5n_t_fY6HPEm6JoqzeVoCmY-T2BfnMwPHitagbhpVwsHiLlXZ_t16WMkFnZz4b8seMH29kIf3HUNsO1Km29yvphwZ5nkcSlG-8IMInuDRQqXZnoCKRxyNoHEIj7y85JrbuxCPs-jWQVQjJIpV4N9ebpGsyZxNV50V9-OIEVNaDQQ8T1iAr83HQTA%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c7e085eb5446bf886d78e127ddb357&_e=ZMYxjo6jHH5Ex_6BfwkJyeMjd-PnaNxKe8YZgNir01D78fKWW3uJW9oH_Wg79ivHzcZFVKOYnoemzF7r6MPP5cEqxTG5yWgzYGCUwIT1FN9NEXbdxxIUBQh3HuVy9avCbM4gESobWdS-FIRL6vkwuRGPLF53WR5n_t_fY6HPEm6JoqzeVoCmY-T2BfnMwPHiWmTggWTALIkpku-hw931_YN1oUtCH7Klfn_0i3FNhBl51DqpeoFZguhbwfOk-eTl7EPtnmEIegOcApuVHvC1UrkGER6dzphjAs_5rdKbhTocoM3PtKKIlgUNg_TDSVwiJjmRy0eZ5n38-jY2QXKo7w%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c7e085eb5446bf886d78e127ddb357&_e=ZMYxjo6jHH5Ex_6BfwkJyeMjd-PnaNxKe8YZgNir01D78fKWW3uJW9oH_Wg79ivHzcZFVKOYnoemzF7r6MPP5cEqxTG5yWgzYGCUwIT1FN9NEXbdxxIUBQh3HuVy9avCbM4gESobWdS-FIRL6vkwuRGPLF53WR5n_t_fY6HPEm6JoqzeVoCmY-T2BfnMwPHihpn0ytkSkMS63qVgubEdGwXbkSWkDjLe7TPFw3AtU44csqvpY2ZG-zvNUGnMxBIqIDHUT_cweTV9BMQc-paZjzG2jv4a2nWJRM5Akp1DqImmDNku8TN2eFjjB5rQ7hStHH1eMKhibh96xSChVUdW4Q%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c7e085eb5446bf886d78e127ddb357&_e=ZMYxjo6jHH5Ex_6BfwkJyeMjd-PnaNxKe8YZgNir01D78fKWW3uJW9oH_Wg79ivHzcZFVKOYnoemzF7r6MPP5cEqxTG5yWgzYGCUwIT1FN9NEXbdxxIUBQh3HuVy9avCbM4gESobWdS-FIRL6vkwuRGPLF53WR5n_t_fY6HPEm6JoqzeVoCmY-T2BfnMwPHirsXlCr-zl5BlKMfUWa8iBD_ig9LNL8NSPRmtT3u4jdwvNpZ38g-XsZ2mu2zvCwgIjNaw523iiHY5EkI0sPgY9IF1lhrjnrhUlCuwazKYRbWF0tJoJ8R-CGnSWSVsqixMtqd9tJjRT3uRPOPORVmkAw%3D%3D)

Friend,

We CANNOT allow the Chinese Communist Party to take over our great nation.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Not good enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15619%2E3422442%2EcWQc62)
Derek,
I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were” _isn’t good enough._
_It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits while more and more families can’t afford necessities._
_It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at school after a shooting in a nearby church._
_It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats._
**Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people.** Republicans funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game for families, making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must prove to voters that democracy can work for them. **[That’s why I’m running for the Senate, and I want you on my team. Can you become a Founding Donor today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14561?refcode=EMAF10_3_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=2&akid=15619%2E3422442%2EcWQc62)**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14561?refcode=EMAF10_3_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=3&akid=15619%2E3422442%2EcWQc62)**
I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the House—delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. **In the House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to fund Member’s pet projects.** I’m leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings is more than a fun prop—my questioning of witnesses in congressional hearings **secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are driving inflation.**
Before I ran for office, I was a consumer protection advocate, and I worked directly with California families who were cheated by the five biggest Wall Street banks prior to the 2008 mortgage crisis. **I held the banks’ feet to the fire and won thousands of victories against the banks, forcing them to pay California families billions.**
I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win, and more importantly, to serve the people of California. But as Elizabeth Warren taught me,_nobody wins alone._ This will be a competitive and expensive race, and I’d be so honored to have your support. **Can you make a contribution today and become a Founding Donor to our campaign?**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Derek, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were” isn’t good enough. It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits while more and more families can’t afford necessities. It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at school after a shooting in a nearby church. It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats. Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game for families, making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must prove to voters that democracy can work for them. I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the House—delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. In the House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to fund Member’s pet projects. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings is more than a fun prop—my questioning of witnesses in congressional hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are driving inflation. Before I ran for office, I was a consumer protection advocate, and I worked directly with California families who were cheated by the five biggest Wall Street banks prior to the 2008 mortgage crisis. I held the banks’ feet to the fire and won thousands of victories against the banks, forcing them to pay California families billions. I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win, and more importantly, to serve the people of California. But as Elizabeth Warren taught me,nobody wins alone. This will be a competitive and expensive race, and I’d be so honored to have your support. Can you make a contribution today and become a Founding Donor to our campaign? If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m so grateful to have you on our team. Katie Porter _

body: Background on discovery of classified documents in Biden office [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... name: Sen. Gary Peters
subject: I'm so proud to serve as DSCC Chair again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I'll need your help. Can you take my exclusive survey?
| | |
Hi friend -- It's Senator Gary Peters, and **_I’m writing to let you know I'm coming back to serve again as Chair of the DSCC for the 2024 election cycle!_**

Senate Democrats won big in 2022 by working hard and taking nothing for granted. Millions of supporters like you were with us every step of the way -- and that's why I’m beyond thrilled for the chance to build on our historic victories together.

Along with our new Vice Chairs, Senators Tina Smith and Alex Padilla, **I know we have what it takes to defend our Senate majority again to keep President Biden's bold agenda rolling forward.**

**[That’s why I’m personally asking you to answer my 2024 Strategy Survey. We need to come out of the gate with a plan to defend our majority so we can protect Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and even our democracy itself. Click here to take the survey >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11588?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230110-SenGaryPeters-ChairReintroduction-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230110-SenGaryPeters-ChairReintroduction-Pros-sl1&akid=9421%2E9716520%2E6AG1ur)

| | [Take the Survey](https://go.dscc.org/go/11588?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230110-SenGaryPeters-ChairReintroduction-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230110-SenGaryPeters-ChairReintroduction-Pros-sl1&akid=9421%2E9716520%2E6AG1ur)
---

Even as you read this, Mitch McConnell’s dark-money allies are already scheming new ways to take Senate control. **We can’t afford to stand idle. I’m ready for this fight, but I need YOU by my side again.[Please let me know you're with me by answering our 2024 Strategy Survey today >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11588?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230110-SenGaryPeters-ChairReintroduction-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230110-SenGaryPeters-ChairReintroduction-Pros-sl1&akid=9421%2E9716520%2E6AG1ur)

Donald J. Trump January 10th, 2023
_“Biden’s open border policies are a deadly betrayal of our nation.” – President Donald J. Trump_

**BIDEN’S BORDER CATASTROPHE: Biden made his first-ever border visit as president after systematically dismantling every major border security measure that President Trump implemented. **

* Shortly after taking office, Biden canceled construction of the wall, moved to halt deportations for 100 days, and instituted catch and release across the entire southern border.

* Biden gutted “Remain in Mexico” and terminated President Trump’s historic asylum agreements with Guatemala, Honduras, and El Salvador.
