Donald J. Trump January 10th, 2023
Statement by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
So interesting to see that people are talking about the Border. When I was running in 2016, I was the only one talking about it, and then in 2020, there was nothing to talk about, because the Border was the best it has ever been, drugs were at the lowest point in the last 40 years, our Border was secure with hundreds of miles of Wall built, and Mexican Soldiers were guarding our Border for free. So, before the Election took place, I couldn’t talk about the Border, because the Border wasn’t a problem. I fixed it. Trump January 10th, 2023 ICYMI: “Donald Trump’s Plan To Destroy the Cartels Biden Bolsters” Read the full article by Lynne Patton for Newsmax . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 10th, 2023 “Biden’s open border policies are a deadly betrayal of our nation.” – President Donald J. Trump BIDEN’S BORDER CATASTROPHE: Biden made his first-ever border visit as president after systematically dismantling every major border security measure that President Trump implemented. Shortly after taking office, Biden canceled construction of the wall, moved to halt deportations for 100 days, and instituted catch and release across the entire southern border. Biden gutted “Remain in Mexico” and terminated President Trump’s historic asylum agreements with Guatemala, Honduras, and El Salvador. Biden effectively abolished interior enforcement, President Trump’s executive order that had expanded immigration officials’ ability to enforce our laws and creating thousands of around America where ICE is not permitted to go. Deportations in 2021 were the on record. In 2022, ICE 61% fewer illegal aliens than in 2020, including 66% fewer criminals, even though border crossings increased by 419%. Biden abolished the Trump administration’s prohibition on deadly sanctuary cities receiving federal funds, abolished the plan to determine whether Census respondents were even American citizens, and pushed to end Title 42. The Biden administration for cutting the number of detention beds by 9,000 at a time when millions of additional illegal aliens are crossing the border. Biden’s administration before the Supreme Court that they should be given the discretion to release violent criminal illegal aliens into communities. In a speech last week, Biden refused to admit that there is any border crisis, praised his “Border Czar” Kamala Harris, and proposed a new mass amnesty plan. A HISTORIC BORDER CRISIS: Biden’s actions have resulted in record-breaking numbers of illegal crossings, enrichment of drug cartels, and a devastating humanitarian crisis. Both 2021 and 2022 saw the largest number of illegal crossings on record. There have been over 5 million illegal crossings since Biden took office. This year is on track to be even worse, with a 617,000 encounters this fiscal year alone. 98 known or suspected terrorists were at the border last year—more than three times the total for the previous five years combined. Encounters with illegal aliens convicted of murder by over 1,900% and of drug trafficking by 480% since 2020. Deadly drugs are pouring across our borders, poisoning hundreds of thousands of our citizens. Last year, enough fentanyl was at the border to kill every single American. Fueled in large part by Biden’s border crisis, fentanyl has become the leading cause of death for Americans between ages 18 and 45. Biden’s open borders have also created a humanitarian crisis. Migrant deaths at the border last year reached a record- of over 800, and human smuggling arrests are 82% since 2014. Cartels and human smugglers have profited off the border crisis with their revenue increasing by an estimated 2,500% since 2018. AMERICA NEEDS THE TRUMP BORDER SECURITY AGENDA: President Trump will wage war on the cartels and create the strongest border in history, just like we had two years ago. President Trump built 450 miles of new border wall system, ended catch and release, rooted out asylum fraud, combated human smuggling, forged historic asylum agreements with Northern Triangle countries, and deployed nearly 5,000 troops to the Southern Border. After President Trump implemented his historic reforms, illegal crossings fell by nearly 90%. President Trump also stripped funding from deadly sanctuary cities and deported over 20,000 gang members, including 4,500 members of the brutal MS-13 gang. President Trump worked with Mexico and other countries to dismantle the human smuggling networks in our hemisphere that fuel the border crisis by exploiting vulnerable groups. Under President Trump, the Department of Justice prosecuted a record number of immigration-related crimes. Last week, President Trump released a bold plan to destroy the cartels just like we destroyed ISIS, including by imposing a full naval embargo to stop cartels from using the waters of our region to smuggle deadly narcotics to America. * President Trump has pledged to fully rebuild the secure border that Joe Biden has dismantled. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 10th, 2023 ICYMI: “The 2017 tax cuts were a huge success” Extend the Trump Tax Cuts! Read the full article from the Washington Examiner . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 10th, 2023 Statement by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America So interesting to see that people are talking about the Border. When I was running in 2016, I was the only one talking about it, and then in 2020, there was nothing to talk about, because the Border was the best it has ever been, drugs were at the lowest point in the last 40 years, our Border was secure with hundreds of miles of Wall built, and Mexican Soldiers were guarding our Border for free. So, before the Election took place, I couldn’t talk about the Border, because the Border wasn’t a problem. I fixed it. It’s amazing what has happened in two years, because now the Border is probably our biggest bone of contention, along with everyone being killed in Ukraine, the Afghanistan Withdrawal which was perhaps our worst Military Withdrawal in History, our Economy that is crashing, and Inflation eating us alive. Biden has allowed the cartels to destroy the Border, and I’ll destroy the cartels! | ---|--- Donald J. New Op-Ed:

** Latino Voters Are Still In Search Of A Working-Class Agenda. (https://latinos.vote/latino-voters-are-still-in-search-of-a-working-class-agenda/)

By Mike Madrid and Lucas Holtz

The education divide that has defined American politics over the last three election cycles has begun to appear in the country’s largest blue state, California. Democrats have captured and retained greater shares of college-educated voters in metro areas, but it has come at the expense of losing rural and blue-collar voters to the Republican Party.

The consequences of this realignment are reshaping the coalitions of both parties and will continue to have an endurable effect on electoral politics for a generation. For California, this trade-off has had the effect of Democrats flipping down-ballot House seats in suburban places like Orange County and northern Los Angeles County but losing races in the rural Central Valley. It could also exacerbate ethnic, class and geographic tensions within the Democratic Party.

In California, as with other states with large Latino populations, the educational realignment has become intertwined with Latino voters’ political shift to the right. California’s 17 most heavily Latino congressional districts (where a Republican and Democrat both ran in 2022) have an average college education rate 20% lower than the rest of the state. Every one of these districts swung right from the 2020 presidential election to the 2022 midterms, with an 11.2% aggregated shift. All but one of these 17 districts swung right from the blue wave of 2018 to this year’s 2022 midterm election. There were three competitive, toss-up districts among these 17, each of which Biden won in 2020 and Republicans managed to win this year.

Gov. Gavin Newsom was reelected with the strong support of ** 62% of Latino voters (https://www.foxnews.com/elections/2022/midterm-results/voter-analysis?year=2022&state=CA)
— but still two points ** lower (https://www.cnn.com/election/2018/exit-polls/california)
than his first election in 2018. This translated into a marginal yet measurable rightward shift in California down-ballot congressional races statewide. In fact, Republicans won seven of California’s 10 most competitive congressional districts in 2022, and Latino voters had an outsize impact in the outcomes of almost every one of these 10 districts.

Relative to 2020, turnout this year, on average, was ** 13% points lower (https://www.cookpolitical.com/charts/house-charts/national-house-vote-tracker/2022)
in the 17 most Latino-concentrated districts than the rest of the state. While there were regional differences, this turnout drop was evident across some of the most crucial Latino-concentrated counties ** in battleground states (https://twitter.com/carlosodio/status/1594738266141491201)
, where Latinos voted at lower rates than in both 2020 and 2018. Although turnout in the three most competitive Latino-concentrated races was marginally higher than the average of the 17 districts — enormously high spending on ads and ground operations likely brought it up — these districts still had lower turnout than the statewide average .As California has shown since the late 1990s, low turnout is a sign of weakness in a party’s base.

** To Continue Reading This Article Click Here. (https://latinos.vote/latino-voters-are-still-in-search-of-a-working-class-agenda/)

Thank You

Thank you for taking the time to read our updates. If you have any news to share, comments to make, or corrections for us, feel free to ** email us (mailto:info@latinos.vote)
anytime.

Best,

The ** The Latino Vote (https://latinos.vote/)
Team

name: Jim Costa
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Costa for Congress
body:
My best wishes to you and your family for a Happy New Year.

| [](http://www.jimcosta.com/?e=220632a5281cdb0f64dbed97211186db&utm_source=jimcosta&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=happynewyear&n=1) January 10, 2023**
**
# **Happy New Year!
**
Dear Friends: My best wishes to you and your family for a Happy New Year.

As I was sworn in as a member of the 118th Congress last week, I was reminded about how this election has been yet another defining moment for our country. A test of our time, because of the combination of historical events; a global pandemic, Russia’s invasion of the Ukraine and inflation caused by those events and other factors.

As your Congressman, I have witnessed firsthand the devastating impacts of threats to our country’s democracy, and I have also been humbled by the incomparable resilience of the American people. I know all of you have heard me say it many times, but I continue to believe our greatest strength is the ability of the American people to come together for the greater good in times of crisis.

It is because of your support that I am able to continue to serve and for that I am truly grateful. I ran for re-election because I still have the passion and conviction to make a difference. I remain committed to working hard every day to find solutions and improve our quality of life. My list of those things I want to accomplish continues to grow, but it will always include strengthening our agricultural industry and rural communities. Our future depends on us coming together and making more repairs to our broken water system, continuing to update our transportation system and bringing a medical school to the valley.

My record as a constructive, bipartisan voice in Congress remains. Your support is greatly appreciated and I will not take it for granted.

Thank you for giving me the honor to serve. If I may ever be of assistance, please never hesitate to call upon me.

And again, in the words of President Volodymyr Zelenskyy of the Ukraine - my best wishes for a "Victorious" New Year.

Sincerely,

** _JIM_**

Jim Costa
21st Congressional District | Paid for by Jim Costa for Congress
---
-=-=- Jim Costa for Congress · 2037 W Bullard, #355, Fresno, CA 93711-1200, United States

If I may ever be of assistance, please never hesitate to call upon me. And again, in the words of President Volodymyr Zelenskyy of the Ukraine - my best wishes for a "Victorious" New Year. Sincerely, JIM Jim Costa 21st Congressional District | Paid for by Jim Costa for Congress -=-=- Jim Costa for Congress · 2037 W Bullard, #355, Fresno, CA 93711-1200, United States

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38280?t=6&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY) [**I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in the next 24 hours – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between myself and Voter Protection Project? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38280?t=7&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY) **Listen, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support:**

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work.**

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in the next 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on you to split a gift between myself and Voter Protection Project? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Hakeem Jeffries and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38281?t=8&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38282?t=9&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38283?t=10&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38284?t=11&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38285?t=12&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY)
Look, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.
[**So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during the next 24 hours as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38280?t=13&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY)
Keep the faith,
Hakeem
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5997%2E878179%2EDErNYY)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Our movement is unstoppable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Just a few days ago, the most progressives **_ever elected_** were officially sworn in to Congress — and with them, the largest Progressive Caucus in history. This moment matters, because it proves the strength of our people-powered movement more than ever before.
Just look at this headline:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25532?refcode=em20230110-2043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2043%2E420207%2E6sTdgS) [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25532?refcode=em20230110-2043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2043%2E420207%2E6sTdgS)
---
**_We are winning._** The Republicans may have narrowly won control of the House, but while they remain largely divided in chaos, our Progressive Caucus is bigger, stronger, and ready to fight tirelessly for the policies that uplift working people.
**Now is the time to reinforce our resources as we prepare for the fights ahead, so I have to ask: Peter, will you contribute $27 or more to our campaign today?**
[**→ Yes, I will donate $27 for the first time!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25532?refcode=em20230110-2043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2043%2E420207%2E6sTdgS)
**[Chip in »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25532?refcode=em20230110-2043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2043%2E420207%2E6sTdgS)**
Our Progressive Caucus is determined to use every tool at our disposal to keep delivering life-saving policies for our communities on the ground. And with every cycle, our unstoppable movement will keep growing.
When we fight for a vision of our country that is diverse, inclusive, and just — one where every person is guaranteed fundamental human rights, a livable environment, a safe home, a dignified wage, and access to affordable, quality healthcare — we all win.
[**Will you join us in this fight for our future, Peter? It can only happen if all of us work together, and I need your support. Can I count on your donation?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25532?refcode=em20230110-2043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2043%2E420207%2E6sTdgS)
Thank you for fighting with me,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230110-2043-footer&t=24&refcode2=2043_420207_6sTdgS&akid=2043%2E420207%2E6sTdgS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Democrats.org
subject: Derek, we already know the GOP doesn’t prioritize seniors, workers, or families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Have you heard how extreme the Republican agenda and plans are? And how much Kevin McCarthy had to give away to the most extreme members of his party to become speaker? | |
---
Derek, after making history as the first speaker in over a hundred years to require multiple votes to get elected, Kevin McCarthy won the title of MAGA Republican speaker of the House. There’s a lot of talk around what they will try and won’t try to pass through Congress. But do you know how extreme their agenda is? And how much Kevin McCarthy give away to the most extreme members of his party to become speaker? Here’s just a few highlights:
* They want to raise prescription drug prices on millions of Americans by repealing key pieces of Democrats’ historic cost-cutting legislation;
* They’re pushing to pass a national abortion ban, even threatening to throw doctors in jail for providing care;
* Kevin McCarthy gave away a major concession that lays the groundwork for extreme MAGA Republicans to force **cuts to key programs like Social Security and Medicare.**

**We’ve got to fight back against this dangerous agenda. Chip in $7 to power our efforts to fight back against the GOP and elect Democrats in 2023, 2024, and beyond.**

clean_body: Have you heard how extreme the Republican agenda and plans are? And how much Kevin McCarthy had to give away to the most extreme members of his party to become speaker? | | Derek, after making history as the first speaker in over a hundred years to require multiple votes to get elected, Kevin McCarthy won the title of MAGA Republican speaker of the House. There’s a lot of talk around what they will try and won’t try to pass through Congress. But do you know how extreme their agenda is? And how much Kevin McCarthy give away to the most extreme members of his party to become speaker? Here’s just a few highlights: They want to raise prescription drug prices on millions of Americans by repealing key pieces of Democrats’ historic cost-cutting legislation; They’re pushing to pass a national abortion ban, even threatening to throw doctors in jail for providing care; Kevin McCarthy gave away a major concession that lays the groundwork for extreme MAGA Republicans to force cuts to key programs like Social Security and Medicare. We’ve got to fight back against this dangerous agenda. Chip in $7 to power our efforts to fight back against the GOP and elect Democrats in 2023, 2024, and beyond. We already know the GOP doesn’t prioritize workers, seniors, or American families like yours. They’re only working to advance their own interests and those of the ultra-wealthy. Right now, the DNC is doing everything we can to fight back and defeat them in every election, everywhere in the country -- but it’s going to take an entire team on board to get the job done. | | NEGOP Unicameral Update "2ND HOUSE ACTION ALERT" TUESDAY, JANUARY 10, 2023
There have been SIGNIFICANT changes proposed in the Rules Committee. The Rules Committee defines HOW the legislature will conduct business. Both positive and negative rules are being proposed. We need citizens to attend the rules committee meeting to make their voices heard. The meeting will be held Thursday, January 12, at 1:30 PM in Room 1525 at the Capitol. If you are unable to attend, please call your Senators (especially those on the [Rules Committee](https://www.ne.gop/so/74OMTSAde/c?w=9uIyJbbjz9sH-4IZg_l-mfiZy8FKKMs6CCR55bycxiQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9jb21taXR0ZWVzL3NlbGVjdC1jb21taXR0ZWVzLnBocCIsInIiOiI2OWM1Yjc2YS04NDkyLTQyNWMtOTY5NS0xMmVlOWRkYTVkMzQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ)) or comment via email on the proposed “Rules Changes”. 55 NEW RULES HAVE BEEN PROPOSED:[https://nebraskalegislature.gov/pdf/session/2023_proposed_rules.pdf](https://www.ne.gop/so/74OMTSAde/c?w=cqdrT-9TvqinVw2tWEjNrhHFovk5YAaRC5FDfEHeneQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9wZGYvc2Vzc2lvbi8yMDIzX3Byb3Bvc2VkX3J1bGVzLnBkZiIsInIiOiI2OWM1Yjc2YS04NDkyLTQyNWMtOTY5NS0xMmVlOWRkYTVkMzQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ)
Republican Introduced “Positives”
* All Committees Shall Have Odd Number Seats (No more tie votes - Proposal 19)
* Video Recordings of Hearings and Floor Debates (NEGOP Legislative Agenda Goal - Proposal 20)
* Eliminate Present Not Voting (Forces Senators To Vote On ALL Bills)
* Written Votes Shall Be Recorded for Transparency (NEGOP Legislative Agenda Goal - Proposal 53)

Democrat Introduced “Negatives”
* Strikes Opening Prayer (Proposal 26)
* Reduces Second Amendment Rights at the Capitol (Proposal 14)
* Allows Absentee Voting of Senators (Proposal 30)
* Calls for a Racial Impact Statement on Each Bill (Proposal 45)

The time is now for citizens to send a message to representatives that we need common-sense rules (no more ties), transparency on voting (key votes are recorded), a record of what is transpiring in the halls of OUR government (Video Recordings), and an affirmative or negative vote to know where our Senators stand on all issues.
Finally, it is imperative that the citizens no longer tolerate Democrat behavior that expresses their contempt for people of faith and the rights of Americans to practice free exercise in the halls of our government. Furthermore, it is time to send a message to the Democrats to end the obsession with ‘wokeness’ (does every bill have “racial impact” that needs to be studied?), and demand our Senators actively show up to work and cast their votes.
Common sense needs to reign and Unconstitutional/Burdensome/Radical agendas need to end! Take appropriate action NOW! [https://nebraskalegislature.gov/senators/senator_list.php](https://www.ne.gop/so/74OMTSAde/c?w=W3TDN2iTXYwCzxy1RDJa-PgPA-OQWNfsXwOjpqvGxC0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9yX2xpc3QucGhwIiwiciI6IjY5YzViNzZhLTg0OTItNDI1Yy05Njk1LTEyZWU5ZGRhNWQzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9)

subject: TOMORROW: Tune into The Glenn Beck Program
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,
**Please tune in tomorrow, January 11, 10:45 AM ET** to hear me discuss the toughest battles going on across state legislatures on the [Glenn Beck Program](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=20c3808faf&e=64ecec6d03).
---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=f220d04874&e=64ecec6d03)

|
---
| As we push forward into 2023 Session, I want to make sure that you are fully connected to the ten state freedom caucuses that we so proudly and actively support. Following them on social media will allow you to see the battles they are in, as they are happening.
* Arizona Freedom Caucus - [Twitter](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=1abab760ca&e=64ecec6d03) | [Facebook](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=e6d81b394c&e=64ecec6d03)

* Idaho Freedom Caucus - [Twitter](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=9976686493&e=64ecec6d03) | [Facebook](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=fd1eff8a87&e=64ecec6d03)
* Illinois Freedom Caucus - [Twitter](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=5c03dd8073&e=64ecec6d03) | [Facebook](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=52b4830fef&e=64ecec6d03)
* Montana Freedom Caucus - [Twitter](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=6c0d24aaf9&e=64ecec6d03)
* Mississippi Freedom Caucus - [Twitter](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=50be9d7d66&e=64ecec6d03) | [Facebook](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=9c1155c211&e=64ecec6d03)
* Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus - [Facebook](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=89105bb3be&e=64ecec6d03)
* South Carolina Freedom Caucus - [Twitter](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=a348913c83&e=64ecec6d03) | [Facebook](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=4f772c645f&e=64ecec6d03)
* South Dakota Freedom Caucus - [Twitter](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=6a16f929ec&e=64ecec6d03) | [Facebook](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=d8c7a9b759&e=64ecec6d03)

It's true that these social media platforms are censoring and deplatforming conservatives on a daily basis, but it also allows us to directly reach out to you when the corporate leftist media ignores us. Please follow them and help spread their message of individual freedom and limited government!
---
|
---
| **Will you consider helping our efforts and fighting alongside us? ** **For just $10 a month, you can support the State Freedom Caucus Network as it works to secure liberty at the state level and finally bring your voice to your state capitol. ** **Click[here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=4222b17424&e=64ecec6d03) to set up your recurring monthly donation now. Even $25 or $50 will make a huge difference.** Thanks to your help and your commitment to the ideas that have made America the indispensable nation, we know we will win. We've helped launch ten caucuses in the last year, and it's only just begun.
Keep fighting,
Andy Roth
President, State Freedom Caucus Network

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Who is undermining Elon?
body:
The latest news is that the law firm representing Twitter stepped down and was replaced with a shady firm named Perkins Coie. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F8yjfn892yc3ETxzGzHK0o5XQ%2F6HxgoD56D3NSEH9hr1HsQw/1/010001859dd2c219-bc03a81d-857f-478b-bb7b-2e486a136bcf-000000/QrIVHT_8eWS4jwfLFJ5EpGEGl_M=304) | Dear Friend,

[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F8yjfn892yc3ETxzGzHK0o5XQ%2F6HxgoD56D3NSEH9hr1HsQw/2/010001859dd2c219-bc03a81d-857f-478b-bb7b-2e486a136bcf-000000/wzoClv6uegzM0tkdVBxzKQ4UQJk=304) My case against Twitter, Facebook, Jack Dorsey, and Mark Zuckerberg keeps advancing, and the latest news is that the law firm representing Twitter stepped down and was replaced with a shady firm named Perkins Coie.

This came as a shock to Twitter's new owner, Elon Musk, who had recently announced that he would never use Perkins Coie, and had advocated for other companies to join him in boycotting the firm.

Why?

Elon took issue with one of Perkins Coie's partners, Michael Sussmann, talking nonsense to the FBI about the Trump Organization being linked to a Russian bank . . . the conspiracy that is now known as "Russiagate".

But, when Sussmann went to the FBI, he left out one key factor . . . Sussmann was working for Hillary Clinton's campaign.

So, Elon is justified in boycotting the firm, and as he says, "No company should use them until they make amends for Sussman's attempt to corrupt a Presidential Election."

Despite Musk's clear and unequivocal stance on Perkins Coie, a staffer in Twitter's legal department went ahead and hired them to fight me in my RICO case.

While Elon Musk has shown progress in combatting social media bias on Twitter, his house is still filled with woke Leftists who openly defy his orders.

Perkins Coie have proven themselves to be dirty as hell, and who knows, I could someday find the FBI knocking on my door claiming I'm tied to Russian banks . . . just like they did to President Trump!

[**Help me take on the rogue employees inside Twitter 's legal department so I can continue my fight to stop Big Tech's criminal enterprise with my RICO lawsuit!**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F8yjfn892yc3ETxzGzHK0o5XQ%2F6HxgoD56D3NSEH9hr1HsQw/3/010001859dd2c219-bc03a81d-857f-478b-bb7b-2e486a136bcf-000000/oQJh9Q1AJlJLs2AdXcsNHHjGoAg=304)

As my case progresses, Big Tech will try their best to drain every resource I have so that I can't afford to fight this legal battle. [**That 's why I need your support today, and the support of thousands of other patriots.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F8yjfn892yc3ETxzGzHK0o5XQ%2F6HxgoD56D3NSEH9hr1HsQw/4/010001859dd2c219-bc03a81d-857f-478b-bb7b-2e486a136bcf-000000/KvBx3V2e_I33NSdMpLPT3ekSn0Y=304)

I will never stop fighting!

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
(C) 2022 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Funsubscribe%2FwJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2F6HxgoD56D3NSEH9hr1HsQw/1/010001859dd2c219-bc03a81d-857f-478b-bb7b-2e486a136bcf-000000/RkErnSkzyznc1tM0yF3mMTNONDM=304)
[View Web Version](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fw%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2F6HxgoD56D3NSEH9hr1HsQw/1/010001859dd2c219-bc03a81d-857f-478b-bb7b-2e486a136bcf-000000/baJInF6W28cPB7xm4ZBY69_lSDY=304)

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950zn8iRJu-e4XfFAR71hNehTQoUDR6N3NWwlft41hUpzUuxt7Q22zWbuTCSWGBgAW2C-sY7FqAEDzS9NBEHCucavXViDldIuT8-hjONO4h7S1c3Vc9sE-68C_Z0qZ_Xig9UJUsGxtFABezMfQCr194a5X4v_QNk6MfE7HTpT3xmb508%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950znhx8eJRUEvSuMDVYEGAWCJDEwTA9WiTtmsDD4ZpQWW2RFfaZzzdncPmkV4ktms0nY-Ei3Ik4W_0QbWUZq3s_pnSoWUBey_S4mLl46WJElihmkAri56lZInnG-iUXVXC03aeJyHh20MZgK9odSWYuVSRtS5JlSdrRTj68Xrd_oC9U%3D) [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950znMlKnTNDpS7xH7bNYXTTcM2KcOHsRBLi7nfQCjvxnQpGt3LNbTv-vIVbswouUqSsyJAwl8LCYF1zQ_-BspV6cOPHUPiEYJV4W2hAFL4VU66GcMHDYUWFdBBAOJVicnFp6Yn6k39meSrOiBNtnB9MHSkAXSATOLCHGbRw9y5_MAP8%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It’s been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn’t expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it’s all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor’s office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael’s back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael’s_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950znInl_mrI6wmQjoffRVC03OA6GvEWdZz2jYKo1F5Yky8qEeXkO0rBaIN3ZSVXsTPyqi9bzdORel9Z0hgpHWi-JICmaCtLclc9u4vaxsRB55MGvh1n09eQUntciFV4_MKOoxwJhDLkVGLf9dwU2OEKPD8oDPvNGci7jkScWMmsSc0Y%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950znF8072US6EVVpjFpVW1jDaRbFJiMZlSFDdm08BdyEJ6ltiBVXQporCEhLnbbyuKWzU8bMh90f0vEhOrYrZMnNmsbThUsN-JPC13K04FLnnPzP_90CaDpj5WCvdBZBkkhr7eaJvY6ZPVPRNl0H2Kpj84B4yErYTvgLWs7XusiRl2I%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong – and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950znwoNiYcgG-tca0iECS07pcWkrUoeqU5CYtV5YMAsm_-WykBKCZ0Qp_Mff9drk5dRzbENb4ldVgDmwIKELLKZyHqxgYGBztlIhPiPPozyrL5ji14aIh1Pz6jsdM3_W_px1CiWju500qyCchVuQCCKZX9-0tgQHnawG0E-slpZWvtA%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950zn2ug5QlSG5VBp50iUqC7uAEVxwzSSetYkECGtEvhRhOcMW1byFWRr4tLF8Nzfhtd8kNyiwFzoQyaHKXMZV81TVt775iY1REiBpWMc0jdhWI6rEAmOP9fmwzQtR_XFWSrxMd0z4r-NKroGEedVUvZBS72pq8luQM5PwofyQHWyYcw%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950znDx8zgq0wngNAQIjW1wMX-55mOf9ubAh-lXlLWH7sMzHUaN8kIC6X3q1pb8iBQ5BCu5nfiTEjwtfI2QBYpPdn5cezwQ1lnMF06QfMtLO_Bm1SY0_yw1jVl4yCelCw6VJIcOvpcQk6YUnmZ5og-h4nQh-VCnHpQWaRJ9gpT8L0tRU%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950znoP0cPGlGjSR_UgdxHTd4kCjPsII9--l-McUiAJqTZRCnckx3CNWKySZCpZSAuar82HpIr6U_kH-63eZ1JAJqchSYLMvyWsuclEjVdF6_kFEqvd4m4eWAdUD1d_gnEQYmEO8sWIzUiwMGbpOWLyLStOy81z3iKVX1KwQA_LlY7Cg%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson – William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b730c51c643b44b48a57468eaa4372ce&_e=cm_n_3oFXNdrpMrvSQdGj4UWPZrgwgGAQEXLraADxqeZFdkBQRSTB2D10lzvs6BWZgrsS51ZrK3w9rMJSZxD_mCHBKp1RFzhVW_KpVE-ktGSNZVxi0gOCay8sZDHCAsVSHljSpiNypZsv7VhsjjUuwl8adQLjuUSG8orjhTwvq7UdFmQfnDW1GyMAwY950zngNR0dxI6gwG-KgGKgsYJZTfk_I9on6TyJ3cJ7bSZUjyYVMfaTdtXHxOd8PMiysAQ47qlqhzt38hu25B4YckV3VWvaR_7BLTyL4W2wNrnDPipjnCIZEe70rNnQ87TVbjLBPsbyf-qllhEnqQ2o82pwMoaiUslLo-2znSuUklmtU8%3D)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we’re defending, please visit**www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_© Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Foushee for Congress
subject: the results are in❗️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress

| Peter,

Before the new year, we asked all our supporters what issues matter to them most. Thank you to every single individual that took the time to fill out our survey. Your responses are so important to us, and we want to hear from every supporter, donor, and friend.

North Carolinians want to see significant changes in -
* Voting Rights **🗳️**
* Climate Change **🌡️**
* Reproductive Rights for all women **🤰**

Congresswoman Foushee is eager to tackle these issues and more in Congress. She’s representing working families and fighting for the things most important to North Carolinians.

[_**But we can’t do this without your support. Will you donate $5 right now to help us fight for these issues?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57176606/387054520/-340664628?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230110-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmFhZTk1OC0zYjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pq_W9A72WxioiOp2f5HO1rZcGo4UJaKnYEzlPTkGGRg=)

Voting rights, climate change, and reproductive rights affect the lives of everyday working people. Fighting extremist Republicans who don’t believe these issues are important is hard work, but Valerie will work every day to resist their extremist agenda.

Friend,

I can't begin to explain how it feels to have the honor of serving you in the U.S. Senate.

**I 'm ready to fight for our freedoms.

I'm ready to fight to defend our Constitution.

I'm ready to fight for our democracy.

I'm ready to fight for what's good, right, and true in these United States of America.**
As a Marine Corps veteran, I truly understand the love of our country.

And friend, I want to reassure you that my love for our country will energize me over the next six years of my term to fight for the taxpayers of Ohio and all those across our nation.

**_**If you haven 't joined our team yet, now is the time.** _ **

Embrace the new year, and **[click here to support Team Vance.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=25741ba6945c43c6a1780ba988a175a4&_e=LVewo0hSPWdE-8cNHPuMCkOphOhA6cvsS2iHObY0fmGEj4SNE-3VRpo8gNBzOUsHiCgWtivDUY_LjGUaRrxUvMhfYRyaWRZX1ajVOXlxV5xQ4mAmkG0hsV8aZx-NQEGx1XBvKaKq6BuTJFLOGF9wW2ea851hPAHbHHBXsx3WaI08Uf7ilAwEvsBU00Z47CnoBSmPk-nV_vH2PrdnO2gphqoXRix3gq7F-y48JcMjq456Zs2W8lvJxafRJNzhXwWHOxk43oNaxh33UYWQWMTa2PHQ5LdG61xTmWxN8VWVgn6aFpahwo-9MilqTS3Z54L0JUeMSiEtINfZEyOFC8H8CSlN4az_GflvNgU47rK94NxLUBob5wTlVG48vE7VUdYsnMdOEv_MVG2LE1550Oj_L7ls7XFxErrKrGkmrfIPq4mcDqettDlym9C6ImkiHT1UOjCCwRjN7dPJYpMzp_-JOcn5hOeyAhaS27a2IblmtIJx6ZXY5iW6fzm-86gir9Uf_a0ymSclgC_QviJAPoqXUA%3D%3D)**

I'll fight for you.

Sincerely,

_JD_

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

_If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation._ | name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I’m running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I just announced: I’m running to represent California in the U.S. Senate.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were”
isn’t good enough.

It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits
while more and more families can’t afford necessities.

It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at
school after a shooting in a nearby church.

It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion
nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats.

Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans
funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game against families,
making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to
Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must
prove to voters that democracy can work for them. That’s why I’m running
for the Senate, and I want you on my team. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18860?t=1001&akid=2883%2E346206%2EphLGmZ ]Can you make a donation
today that will support my campaign for Senate and Charles Booker’s
progressive movement?

CHIP IN →

I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the
House—delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. In the
House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to
fund Members' pet projects. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional
stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings
is more than a fun prop—my questioning of witnesses in congressional
hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass
bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are
driving inflation.

Before I ran for office, I was a consumer protection advocate, and I
worked directly with California families who were cheated by the five
biggest Wall Street banks prior to the 2008 mortgage crisis. I held the
banks’ feet to the fire and won thousands of victories against the banks,
forcing them to pay California families billions.

I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win, and
more importantly, to serve the people of California. But as Elizabeth
Warren taught me, nobody wins alone. This will be a competitive and
expensive race, and I’d be so honored to have your support. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18860?t=1002&akid=2883%2E346206%2EphLGmZ ]Can you
make a split contribution today and become a Founding Donor to our Senate
campaign?

Katie Porter

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230110-2883-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2883_346206_phLGmZ&akid=2883%2E346206%2EphLGmZ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2883%2E346206%2EphLGmZ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Katie Porter for California
subject: 94% of the way there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We just checked the numbers and we’re 94% of the way to our $1,000,000 launch day fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe)
Derek,
We just got an update from our finance team — and not only did we blow past our**** $500,000 launch day fundraising goal, **we're 94% of the way to our updated $1,000,000 goal!**
**[This goal isn’t random and it isn’t a gimmick (more on that below), but time is running out for us to hit our launch day goal for Katie Porter’s Senate run. Will you rush a contribution right now and become a founding donor for our Senate campaign?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14567?refcode=EMAF10_4_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=2&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe)**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14567?refcode=EMAF10_4_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=3&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe)
**Let’s cut through the BS and explain why reaching this goal is so important: First, we’ll need those resources to turn today’s _huge_ groundswell of grassroots support into long-term momentum and organizing.

Second, every political pundit in America is closely watching our campaign launch. They’re going to look at today’s fundraising numbers and decide if they think we have what it takes to win.

If we fall short of our goal then we run the risk of being written off before we’ve even gotten off the ground. It sucks, but that’s the reality of politics.
**
**[So please chip in today to make sure we can show our strength right out of the gate—and, more importantly, to give us the resources we’ll need to build our movement long-term.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14567?refcode=EMAF10_4_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=4&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14568?refcode=EMAF10_4_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=5&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe) [Donate $22 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14569?refcode=EMAF10_4_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=6&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14570?refcode=EMAF10_4_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14571?refcode=EMAF10_4_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=8&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14572?refcode=EMAF10_4_LAU_20230110_V1_F-el&t=9&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14567?refcode=EMAF10_4_LAU_20230110_V1_F&t=10&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe)
---
We have a long road ahead of us until Election Day—but with this grassroots movement at our backs, we’re going to get there and **we’re going to win.**

Let’s do this!

Team Katie Porter for California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=11&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=15644%2E3422442%2EIHJLDe)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
